name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Mental health at your fingertips
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
know that you’re not alone | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSWBZFs01BYMypoHlM3cxlgwv-92_O2TxgNS-UcF31GCmZ1p0feYF0giT5Z9QNA8pvqtUSn60tgc3WbhJFZuBcWM-DCbVjj3LI_i1YE627kHHqj01eTfFbC_thOqtFoGPh9jnRvNT7gUMD2T--B_yZvJjToxUVVyCJc0kAYnEE3tu6zlWiG7lJn9nKGb8vD0x-1wuVivbEvsw4436Fs-0_Ir-HpciYDTB3OFly726R2K07AFcL5Ioa76AyTMYstZpSGTR8PAMEQ70MVvL_f9KMf4VENwWIt4U49cP4pzpbNzWkxUxMGc8jGXOzT449YwVIrkfgSNluQL6BsTXO0xJAP5MlNdYtucTGbeGp4GNNxb7) |
---|---|---
Friends,

Everyday, we’re moving closer to getting Indiana back to business. There’s so much to look forward to and on Friday, Governor Holcomb will provide us with an update on the next steps to Indiana’s phased reopening.

But through it all, there’s no doubt that Hoosiers have experienced a lot of changes. _**If you’ve felt increased anxiety, depression or other mental health issues during this time – know that you’re not alone.**_

_**That’s why today Governor Holcomb helped unveil a new website,[BeWellIndiana.org](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSWBZFs01BYMypoHlM3cxlgwv-92_O2TxgNS-UcF31GCmZ1p0feYF0giT5Z9QNA8pvqtUSn60tgc3WbhJFZuBcWM-DCbVjj3LI_i1YE627kHHqj01eTfFbC_thOqtFoGPh9jnRvNT7gUMD2T--B_yZvJ6NN3ic2mbCkyhBUeG9Dy5OVS71asIKF011gBehn63erl8J0hz995mRyAhlMvjUSVYvqXa7pe3uas9SjDnDsDoAJr8UTyZIkxS1SkE2L9kUu-4csBPNWRxCe8PJ5xN_M1Ji9pJnXG6zuZ_6KcQx1ZWXZ8Vy9IAI1qgM1zSY5i3cSsx2gt-xsMCa2rfgCqi0eCRMegAKzF5dLHFUKlRz5wz), that’s putting free mental health resources at Hoosiers’ fingertips.**_
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSVCZL6C9AcFDvFlhgr06EWS8TFK8RaOun5JKUyU4U8JKveaQ8m3UVytf9d-KL5t445a_ZC4JiBYdmzWVk4hObfMam-CBpilhgAeHQ3oN6A6fxyrk3rtO0Lw99-k2vQt1KUTCeSLKkc7TCyGvDz4arSiEeL8toJryiPxjkzFSo3TtW0hiN_Nom3H7LTPf5QHH9cj_i-jdcZjfvGM_WUXLEPipq60Nq1cugU8-fRuI37Uw1TknXG0HRJJgLDM3d2wUcdgFDXqeHYoe--lwae7lCcu4bKkRWc-fATgnjpFRkJMC7eNuvrkaKDidSNIk4GPXt-KNyXweTkJKgADIYQpCBBYKwBtzBt1BxGed6GoQjkSnBWJEDa5jiW7CRZGBu588SVyxuYfo5iHtgDdkh-zfRkBGQaCDlwlzrmquxZtYTH1s)
[ **Like and Share Our Post on Facebook** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSVCZL6C9AcFDvFlhgr06EWS8TFK8RaOun5JKUyU4U8JKveaQ8m3UVytf9d-KL5t445a_ZC4JiBYdmzWVk4hObfMam-CBpilhgAeHQ3oN6A6fxyrk3rtO0Lw99-k2vQt1KUTCeSLKkc7TCyGvDz4arSiEeL8toJryiPxjkzFSo3TtW0hiN_Nom3H7LTPf5QHH9cj_i-jdcZjfvGM_WUXLEPgrkSe_uVSSHb07LoWmVBAdniSibbDNTqFDy96kZ1OwRT1DwSalxx7Ukhh9Gl0MoVvX-MrtnC_OKG-DwsAbfEUFHr7rQQaV2wnaV0mifb_VF0Wy7IAmcGRkcCHeUYV_pTEvZYxnXl9wFEkp1avtUsLqsQsGbSCzFcZIO5DB3sg9NWz6JUuIwP3dF0REPsopEls4ZiGN1S9F4zGWngZDV7M9)
If you visit [**BeWellIndiana.org**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSWBZFs01BYMypoHlM3cxlgwv-92_O2TxgNS-UcF31GCmZ1p0feYF0giT5Z9QNA8pvqtUSn60tgc3WbhJFZuBcWM-DCbVjj3LI_i1YE627kHHqj01eTfFbC_thOqtFoGPh9jnRvNT7gUMD2T--B_yZvKDBmCksyy2fC5TkyCvRu_7ZAU8ICjQ6ULqU8-g--23zqbUZb7uZBUhyDlcfvT7U_xRmeGEcLgLKRVNe6zevv8gC1fw4s59X6e50LvKyMGiyNxq9LU_L5Q5fKE7bZAfHgCFKYWFyEl43cLPmux4NBM0p9aJsvdZDV6nK8TE15xviuT5YF2xF1aSZZn9qXSvzBvSHl7RIL7FT4MRDwMmbAOM), you’ll find:

* Videos with medical experts
* Coping mechanisms and crisis counseling
* Domestic violence resources
* Tips for helping children, youth and teens
* Simple self-assessments to help you determine if you could benefit from mental health support

Across the state, there’s countless stories of Hoosiers stepping up to help one another – Hoosiers making masks, getting their neighbors’ groceries, putting encouraging signs in their windows, or just calling their friends.

_**But also don’t forget to take care of yourself – whether that’s now when we’re still all hunkered down at home, or it’s months from now when we’re all experiencing a new normal.**_

We encourage all members of the Holcomb Crew to visit [**BeWellIndiana.org**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSWBZFs01BYMypoHlM3cxlgwv-92_O2TxgNS-UcF31GCmZ1p0feYF0giT5Z9QNA8pvqtUSn60tgc3WbhJFZuBcWM-DCbVjj3LI_i1YE627kHHqj01eTfFbC_thOqtFoGPh9jnRvNT7gUMD2T--B_yZvKotq61Lq1xznx6o5opdp983RpdyDDzNvNfyIloDYC7dZRQ3HS6RALu-A-YhsB3l92N2dlER5_wK4U7Z1WqS7sf-uwHRDlp9yUQ2HwyzjkBDCf_YezMCGr-zogdAWMA4P1JKOiTl9fejCkL1i_6GeyRMEuKN-_YMhxKMLxp1pQfBOGanLffPNiBRIjrAfrbH3CZm7PhjScRHLLLAUFByKkN), take some time to focus on your mental health...and be well.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. Here’s something else to look forward to – military flyovers to honor our healthcare heroes!

* Tuesday: The Indiana Air National Guard will fly over Fort Wayne from 11:10 a.m. – 11:15 a.m. (**[see a map here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSVCZL6C9AcFDvFlhgr06EWRm7Pvb01L7BAoRqgf9CEkqiYyV3rrt2u06pVp61Ds2ajjp9UwUmK9owiQx6SRx9SiYcBNDeIHcd6-56hC_NVASs-xzH8PxnIt-i-qen-IA7syDlc3IoNjbcl-dl8jMTfiyN4B3TFxUBehsTHDyD-nb77K7_f72QTlqH11OcwRJU7gb8nj7ep9hSFN1XLFDb5gNfeoNDi3wHYXFcghuq_ogGozqwoPsTR-5PmZQxf7hxRZsGbn-B3tIvIJl4WdKjOS7EQJH1X_vgxBTjQVMm4hTax6livTuRycFElfAimpPho3Wq_0UN9P4LRnpEki0UuWILZMJdQk1MZ8-_NsnivAwLHv5EP-Xn17Bq0umt7Hm2KbYox-CwbXOCRnwozj9hx3dyg6nOtVaoyc_8DZU_4haMDIttsveXMUgWxgORfpLWRLSqaJnGkIE1S8t2DW1Wkc%3D)**)
* Wednesday: The Blue Angels will fly over Indianapolis
* Thursday: The Indiana Air National Guard will fly over Indianapolis on Thursday from 10:45 a.m. – 11:02 a.m. ([**see a map here**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1c7acf9307a4815839788e11b36309c&_e=cdWh6QCTio_xQOYvcyajSVCZL6C9AcFDvFlhgr06EWRm7Pvb01L7BAoRqgf9CEkqiYyV3rrt2u06pVp61Ds2ajjp9UwUmK9owiQx6SRx9SgHbSeK0tYrB8F8F8_HHNy6IpF3fcyq-XlVtQo1mM_sJF79YCvHdvyneChDoa_b2OpWoo1u69ia1RoZ343DRSISqOfFt5L1PAWmURTf9x8Lx5U0sLDCH-0_luF_BHGj-RwNHws1H0iF5JNNCk-1NYnIaCl1JezlDAO10zeFHpRYJPBeuvMnNj39cD-kM7Jmzolt3Y4-Hk-UHCAj_dyy8tUhPT52Sh2QV1r6F2j9xQjiees2svLvjuTWXPO7rdMKZx699tHHPFH6_xKq533sp4gewF2OL6LogNFKwqjKzHU-IoA1k6c7jj9Bv47HXcsSXPt2uiSZLeGxgx3OOCHaDFNQbgGrspgYzrXVt9eB244U788bHs-RyqhSW5QC4oYqOt0%3D))

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: No retreat. No surrender.
body:
TTV sues to stop Nevada Sec of State from imposing universal mail-in voting by administrative fiat | | |
# [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a8c3e1c614&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
Dear Friend
First New Mexico, now Nevada.

I've included the full press release at the bottom of the email, but here's the short version - politicos and power brokers are seizing upon the COVID crisis as their opportunity to control the American voter by destroying the processes that keep elections free and fair.
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bb8c818497&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
We're fighting in the courts to protect your voting rights from being stolen by rogue bureaucrats and radical agendas! Thank you for helping support these critical cases!
| What happens in these states will spread across the country. We cannot stand by and watch.

We are fighting for you, for your children, for our freedom. No retreat. No surrender.

**[Thank you for your continued support. We are ALL in this together.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fa860e73ed&e=ad8cba7e98)**

Stay tuned. More to come!

Onward -

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

**[P.S. We are not doing this because we have a war chest of resources. We don't. We are counting on your support. Please help. We need to raise millions - and every penny is being put towards these fights. ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d6b33440b8&e=ad8cba7e98)**
---
| [ SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0d04b2af6a&e=ad8cba7e98 " SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE")
---
| _**Here's the full press release:**_
**True the Vote Sues Nevada to Protect Voters’ Rights ** **_Asks court to stop Nevada secretary of state from imposing universal mail-in voting by administrative fiat because it removes safeguards against fraudulent votes; usurps the legislature; and violates citizens_** ’ **_constitutional rights_**
True the Vote has filed suit in the U.S. District Court for the District of Nevada on behalf of three registered Nevada voters asking for declaratory and injunctive relief to halt the secretary of state’s imposition of an “universal mail-in election” (Stanley William Paher, et al. v. Barbara Cegavske, in her capacity as Nevada Secretary of State and Deanna Spikula, in her official capacity as Registrar of Voters for Washoe County (No. 3:20-cv-00243)). The lawsuit argues the secretary of state’s mail-in-balloting plan violates both the Nevada and United States Constitutions and that imposing a universal mail-in balloting would lead to widespread election fraud. On March 24, 2020, supposedly in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, Republican Secretary of State Barbara Cegavske bent to demands by Democrats and state administrators and [announced a plan](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b325d5600d&e=ad8cba7e98) essentially to abolish in-person voting and conduct, instead, the June 9, 2020 primary election by universal mail-in balloting. According to the plan, all active registered voters in Nevada automatically will be mailed a primary-election ballot for mail-in voting. Voters are not required to take any action or steps, such as submitting an application, in order to receive a ballot, as required in traditional absentee balloting.
True the Vote claims specifically that the secretary of state’s plan to impose universal mail-in voting (“all-mail” voting) violates citizens’ right to vote because it:
* removes safeguards against fraudulent votes that dilute legal votes;
* violates citizens’ rights to vote in federal elections with the manner of election chosen by the state legislature;
* usurps elected representatives’ constitutional prerogative to choose the manner of election and replaces the electoral system devised by the legislature with a plan devised and implemented by unelected administrators and political appointees;
* transgresses the U.S. Supreme Court’s repeated admonition (based on the so-called “Purcell Principle”) that the courts ordinarily should not alter election rules on the eve of an election, which, because the Principle is anchored in the right to vote and its potential debasement, applies equally to political appointees and state and local election administrators as well; and
* violates citizens’ right to a republican form of government guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution.

On April 16th, in a separate suit, Nevada Democrats pressed even further, [suing ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=058cadf1c8&e=ad8cba7e98) to force Secretary Cegavske to mail ballots to every name in the voter registry, not just active registrations. Additionally, they seek to weaken current state rules that invalidate ballots because of mismatched signatures and prohibit vote harvesting.
True the Vote’s lawsuit filed against Nevada today comes less than a month after winning a [stunning](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a0db3d783e&e=ad8cba7e98) victory for election integrity in New Mexico, stopping the state’s efforts to impose universal mail-in voting. On March 30, a group of New Mexico county clerks together with the secretary of state, [petitioned](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f3d84c7f95&e=ad8cba7e98) the Supreme Court to shut down all in-person voting in the June 2 New Mexico primary election and impose, instead, universal mail-in voting.
On April 14, the New Mexico Supreme Court unanimously rejected the bureaucrats’ demand for the Court to go over the legislature’s head and impose universal mail-in balloting from the bench. Instead, the Court directed county clerks to mail absentee ballot applications to all registered voters, preserving the option to vote by mail while still supporting security measures to protect against fraud.
“Three weeks ago, we prevailed with the New Mexico Supreme Court to stop an unconstitutional scheme that would have imposed universal mail-in voting from the bench. Today we are in federal court to defend the rights of Nevada voters,” said True the Vote President Catherine Engelbrecht. “These are just two of many states that are being used in a well-orchestrated globalist scheme to intentionally destabilize state run election processes, giving free-range to fraud in ways that will remain long after the fog of COVID has lifted. This is a blatant attempt to silence the voice of the American voter by destroying the processes that keep elections free and fair. We’re asking all American voters to stand with us in defense of voters’ rights. Make no mistake, if we do not act now to preserve our liberties, they will be taken from us.”
James Bopp, Jr., of The Bopp Law Firm PC, lead counsel for the Nevada Voters, and General Counsel for True the Vote Voters’ Rights Initiative says: “There are national implications for voters nationwide. There is no precedent for such an extraordinary bureaucratic action to overturn laws passed laws by the Legislature to regulate voting in state elections and to put the bureaucrats in charge. Should these politicians succeed in Nevada, it would create a precedent for others to follow and to impose similarly unprotected and unrestricted voting procedures though bureaucratic fiat.” [**Plaintiffs** ’ **Preliminary-Injunction Motion**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c5fcfa89fd&e=ad8cba7e98) [**Complaint for Declaratory and Injunctive Relief**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d0f764c0c6&e=ad8cba7e98)
### [True the Vote](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a13182084c&e=ad8cba7e98) (TTV) is an IRS-designated 501(c)3 voters' rights organization, founded to inspire and equip volunteers for involvement at every stage of our electoral process. TTV empowers organizations and individuals across the nation to actively protect the rights of legitimate voters, regardless of their political party affiliation. For more information, please visit [www.truethevote.org](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=071cd3dee8&e=ad8cba7e98).
---

---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3409421a23&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3976c4ba84&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109 #19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98&c=e2225fe11c).

True the Vote’s lawsuit filed against Nevada today comes less than a month after winning a victory for election integrity in New Mexico, stopping the state’s efforts to impose universal mail-in voting. On March 30, a group of New Mexico county clerks together with the secretary of state, the Supreme Court to shut down all in-person voting in the June 2 New Mexico primary election and impose, instead, universal mail-in voting. On April 14, the New Mexico Supreme Court unanimously rejected the bureaucrats’ demand for the Court to go over the legislature’s head and impose universal mail-in balloting from the bench. Instead, the Court directed county clerks to mail absentee ballot applications to all registered voters, preserving the option to vote by mail while still supporting security measures to protect against fraud. “Three weeks ago, we prevailed with the New Mexico Supreme Court to stop an unconstitutional scheme that would have imposed universal mail-in voting from the bench. Today we are in federal court to defend the rights of Nevada voters,” said True the Vote President Catherine Engelbrecht. “These are just two of many states that are being used in a well-orchestrated globalist scheme to intentionally destabilize state run election processes, giving free-range to fraud in ways that will remain long after the fog of COVID has lifted. This is a blatant attempt to silence the voice of the American voter by destroying the processes that keep elections free and fair. We’re asking all American voters to stand with us in defense of voters’ rights. Make no mistake, if we do not act now to preserve our liberties, they will be taken from us.” James Bopp, Jr., of The Bopp Law Firm PC, lead counsel for the Nevada Voters, and General Counsel for True the Vote Voters’ Rights Initiative says: “There are national implications for voters nationwide. There is no precedent for such an extraordinary bureaucratic action to overturn laws passed laws by the Legislature to regulate voting in state elections and to put the bureaucrats in charge. Should these politicians succeed in Nevada, it would create a precedent for others to follow and to impose similarly unprotected and unrestricted voting procedures though bureaucratic fiat.” (TTV) is an IRS-designated 501(c)3 voters' rights organization, founded to inspire and equip volunteers for involvement at every stage of our electoral process. TTV empowers organizations and individuals across the nation to actively protect the rights of legitimate voters, regardless of their political party affiliation. For more information, please visit . | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved. You signed up for this e-mail on our website at www.truethevote.org Our mailing address is:** True the VotePO Box 3109 #19128Houston, TX 77253-3109 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

Dear Friend, They will dismiss our optimism.
They will say that kindness can't win the day.
They will tell us to go back, to business as usual.
[But now is the time to #TakeaStand](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1AA/ni0YAA/t.31b/l-rG0uuuRMOuIwahie3e0Q/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMXn1jz4z4398YYt9p6imVA9UBE2g5G9k007s25w0dAcJFpZr0lGmYtkraxTAO5Fpooft2RKWu56UMEZUf9xS-2FKGVSsqNhMkFJyqaIxyoFwrMIRqWzuYmGljhH-2B9sWAkG9nT-2FwpCaqgggXfYrxiHNCWger7MP7pM6OdUtNLkRokgwf6x-2F01hD1eiUQFxIcE6-2FBf37TzQPLaNLb1-2FRfEPB1rBzuToqFUha1k-2B6O44Eq0eUavb8ElqWAZ49MgyK-2BTAK-2B/Xq1t). Ballots will arrive in Oregon mailboxes starting Friday, and our movement is rising. Today we launched our new video that has already reached over 10,000 people on social media. We called and texted 32,000 voters in the district, and we will be delivering yard signs to hundreds of supporters this week. Our team is working around the clock to get the word out about the upcoming voter registration deadline (April 28) and vote-by-mail election (May 19). We are counting on you to help us cross the finish line first. So much is at stake. clean_body: They will dismiss our optimism. They will say that kindness can’t win the day. They will tell us to go back, to business as usual. But now is the time to #takeastand. | | | Dear Friend, They will dismiss our optimism. They will say that kindness can't win the day. They will tell us to go back, to business as usual. . Ballots will arrive in Oregon mailboxes starting Friday, and our movement is rising. Today we launched our new video that has already reached over 10,000 people on social media. We called and texted 32,000 voters in the district, and we will be delivering yard signs to hundreds of supporters this week. Our team is working around the clock to get the word out about the upcoming voter registration deadline (April 28) and vote-by-mail election (May 19). We are counting on you to help us cross the finish line first. So much is at stake. I need your help now to make sure we reach every primary voter. If you have'n't seen it yet, please watch and share our new ad on and . We need your help to make sure that this ad is seen by every Democratic voter in our district before Election Day. Thank you for taking a stand. Onward, Doyle Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check Up with Dr. Manny 4/27
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, This week, we will begin to start reopening the economy. I'm thrilled that we are one step closer to getting back out on the road on our big orange bus and meeting Tennesseans all across the state. I know many of you, like me, are anxious to resume your normal lives. My recommendation as a doctor is to follow the governor's guidelines and continue to exercise caution. As always, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [manny@drmannyforsenate.com](http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com). **News: ** Last week, President Trump announced he would be suspending all immigration to the United States during this global pandemic. I fully support the President and his decision to temporarily discontinue issuing green cards. [Read my release in the _Tennessee Star_ here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-j/) I also released a plan to get our economy repoened while following public health and safety regulations so that we can get Tennesseans back to work, and also make sure this virus doesn't come back. [Read my commentary in the _Tennessean _here.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Social Media:** [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-i/) I’ve been incredibly fortunate to meet so many of you in my travels around our state and I can’t wait to get back on the road!
I look forward to answering all your questions and talking with you, [but in the meantime, here’s 10 things you might not know about me.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-d/) Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-h/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-k/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-u/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, wear a mask even if you are feeling fine, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please continue to adhere to the guidelines being put forth by [President Trump](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-o/), [Governor Lee](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-b/), and [the CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-n/), even as the economy gets up and running again. There is a light at the end of the tunnel, and we will get there together. I sure can't wait to get back out on our big orange bus and visit every corner of Tennessee! Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of us! Dr. Manny P.S. There are almost 100 days until election day! A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhuiykc-olhhkyhhid-p/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Wondering when it's time to reopen RI? Here's our plan.
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Everyone wants to know: how soon can we begin to safely reopen the economy? It's on my mind everyday. I don't want to keep anyone out of work a minute longer than necessary. Today, I want to take some time to talk about what that looks like, and how we'll know when we're ready.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013m2IuvqUMdbuv0LUFncckh_oRMS78mJq7VsFehSYOId4lvC2GC0HCqx1WLIE35FJ37JR69YeaZ3hIFPM-Ucd-UG74r5N8XGOMMV1CkkzV6ump0IAfv_H3n3qtSi4X6UM3Bw05NNxMLKtJ3NXLVJb_pFzPnmlw4FpntGxxSyrEXJi534-9z1YA9AGlUhUXOqziRXJDQfx_8A=&c=AlIy_04gto5Ihsm4K6cS85GBVdnxgA3DCaFm1Yior7e6qhPmVO98xw==&ch=hqyv44EIX2kGvLxIUJoTf52SyA7OIYodu9mG-eyDKOdjPyQshYfE9A==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013m2IuvqUMdbuv0LUFncckh_oRMS78mJq7VsFehSYOId4lvC2GC0HCqx1WLIE35FJ37JR69YeaZ3hIFPM-Ucd-UG74r5N8XGOMMV1CkkzV6ump0IAfv_H3n3qtSi4X6UM3Bw05NNxMLKtJ3NXLVJb_pFzPnmlw4FpntGxxSyrEXJi534-9z1YA9AGlUhUXOqziRXJDQfx_8A=&c=AlIy_04gto5Ihsm4K6cS85GBVdnxgA3DCaFm1Yior7e6qhPmVO98xw==&ch=hqyv44EIX2kGvLxIUJoTf52SyA7OIYodu9mG-eyDKOdjPyQshYfE9A==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
|
---
| We've spent the past two months weathering the storm. Now, we're ready to move beyond that and to land at a new destination -- a Rhode Island that's stronger and more resilient. But to get from here to there, we're going to have to take a phased approach to reopening, with different restrictions being lifted at different times. Our reopening framework, including more detail about these phases and the different metrics we're tracking, is available at [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013m2IuvqUMdbuv0LUFncckh_oRMS78mJq7VsFehSYOId4lvC2GC0HCk8g7KQKZJNjcBcxEztYXH3iVAo7wmz6nItt4yBoZ1E6KaXnbcZW7CcLRs_ZfOSPumBUnrjyD3mKobNCr4r_Gu5Mz4b0nxepSw==&c=AlIy_04gto5Ihsm4K6cS85GBVdnxgA3DCaFm1Yior7e6qhPmVO98xw==&ch=hqyv44EIX2kGvLxIUJoTf52SyA7OIYodu9mG-eyDKOdjPyQshYfE9A==). We'll continually update this website as we have more guidance and details to share. We also want to hear your feedback--check out the website and [let us know what you think](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013m2IuvqUMdbuv0LUFncckh_oRMS78mJq7VsFehSYOId4lvC2GC0HCk8g7KQKZJNjcBcxEztYXH3iVAo7wmz6nItt4yBoZ1E6KaXnbcZW7CcLRs_ZfOSPumBUnrjyD3mKobNCr4r_Gu5Mz4b0nxepSw==&c=AlIy_04gto5Ihsm4K6cS85GBVdnxgA3DCaFm1Yior7e6qhPmVO98xw==&ch=hqyv44EIX2kGvLxIUJoTf52SyA7OIYodu9mG-eyDKOdjPyQshYfE9A==).
---
|
---
| The first phase of our recovery is all about testing the waters. It's about watching what happens with this virus when we gradually loosen some of these restrictions. Life in phase 1 won't feel drastically different than it does now, but it's a bit more open and free. And if we don't overdo it -- if everyone takes the necessary precautions we need to during this phase -- we'll be able to move into phase 2 -- "navigating our way."
Phase 2 is all about new models for businesses. More businesses will be opened, and restrictions will be further relaxed. You'll be able to go out to eat at more restaurants, get your hair cut at more locations, go shopping at more retailers -- but all of that will look a bit different, with new restrictions and social distancing rules in place. Additional childcare options will be available. Office-based businesses will invite more of their workforce back to work. And social gatherings will get a bit bigger, though we'll still be limited to only 15 people.
That will bring us to phase 3, "picking up speed." By phase 3, we'll know what's working and what's not working, and we'll be able to adjust our approach accordingly. We'll be able to loosen more of the restrictions on businesses, increase capacity at restaurants, stores, and offices, and have larger social gatherings with as many as 50 people. Every place you go will feel a bit different, but the routine will start to feel a bit more like it used to. Places like malls and concert venues will be the last to fully open, but many other recreational sites will be opened with new restrictions in place.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013m2IuvqUMdbuv0LUFncckh_oRMS78mJq7VsFehSYOId4lvC2GC0HCk8g7KQKZJNj-jf6Oyi6FrQivwl04dcSeAuX03RVYD6RDwkIglmpBu2Zu_B0XUeGITd_NDkKKPpQ9NZAKaZUTPDJ3-54swlTmUWmvlaWyhP_-dhOZSKOEPlj0qxul8PAsCbGD9flk7gML_MKKaBNjac=&c=AlIy_04gto5Ihsm4K6cS85GBVdnxgA3DCaFm1Yior7e6qhPmVO98xw==&ch=hqyv44EIX2kGvLxIUJoTf52SyA7OIYodu9mG-eyDKOdjPyQshYfE9A==)
---
| It's important to note that phase 3 is not the end of the road. We will get to a point where malls, concerts, big sporting events and more will be reopened. We will get to a point where our economy is thriving again, and our state is stronger and more resilient. That's beyond phase three -- that's the new destination. That's the phase when we start to see schools reopening under new guidelines. And I hope it won't be too long until we get there. But all of that depends on the precautions we continue to take over the next few months.
I know the first question on everyone's mind is -- how long will each phase last? How long will it take before we get to that destination? And the honest answer is I don't know. It depends on all of us. The gradual approach we are taking only works if every Rhode Islander takes a gradual approach in our own lives as well. If everyone rushes out on May 9, we're going to see another spike and have to close down again.
But if, throughout all of these phases, we are wearing masks, keeping six feet of space, washing our hands, using hand sanitizer frequently, and trying not to go out more than we need to, we'll get through these phases much faster. The more we cooperate, the faster we can go in reopening Rhode Island.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013m2IuvqUMdbuv0LUFncckh_oRMS78mJq7VsFehSYOId4lvC2GC0HCk8g7KQKZJNjCY82FfWWCHV7D501wJ4ohWxht1sdygFo3YPjJB_NugMNYG57R3dD8mxUj_RCy5-M3orsG2e8MwZqsbLQG5fCwJw6r9Pkxp8P7NZsHMrpq_Cs4ACQE1cCE_FOGid9B_SLKpsNV3jtrDdqdeYYpaM3BCX0xjZd6bHwpjniaFJKfX8vwEc0EBWcCYZ3DG54CDNMcpWcJ5f-BuhF47pEg2CdMr06N1E5ZHzxOzZazEkLWJ3QTsn6ZVn5MPXgmKgwNNmgkJinpOH_k9g=&c=AlIy_04gto5Ihsm4K6cS85GBVdnxgA3DCaFm1Yior7e6qhPmVO98xw==&ch=hqyv44EIX2kGvLxIUJoTf52SyA7OIYodu9mG-eyDKOdjPyQshYfE9A==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=b0ca9275-0d3d-4fb8-bebc-196a59021028)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=b0ca9275-0d3d-4fb8-bebc-196a59021028) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Help Us Beat Pete!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
---
Dear Friend -- I'm asked all the time why we need so much money to win a congressional campaign. The simple answer is - we've got to get our message out, or the other guy will drown us out. In the last 48 hours we've fallen off pace to reach our aggressive April goal. **[Can you help us catch back up with a quick donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17290297/189548249/-1907457919?refcode=RKC_042820_em_fr_all_eom1_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDRlNGM5ZC01YTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7e8tIaqCb5EGxaDjBmV7VkrlStL5J5RkX0Nz4z4h1E=)** | **[CHIP IN>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17290298/189548250/-1907457919?refcode=RKC_042820_em_fr_all_eom1_btn1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDRlNGM5ZC01YTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7e8tIaqCb5EGxaDjBmV7VkrlStL5J5RkX0Nz4z4h1E=)**
---
The COVID-19 pandemic has laid bare the long-term implications of the policies of the last two decades. Nobody wants an intrusive government telling us how to live our everyday lives, but we __do__ want a government that is capable and prepared to act to protect the lives and livelihoods of all Americans when crisis hits.
Pete Sessions was in Congress for the last two decades. He did not build that government.

clean_body: | Dear Friend -- I'm asked all the time why we need so much money to win a congressional campaign. The simple answer is - we've got to get our message out, or the other guy will drown us out. In the last 48 hours we've fallen off pace to reach our aggressive April goal. = | = The COVID-19 pandemic has laid bare the long-term implications of the policies of the last two decades. Nobody wants an intrusive government telling us how to live our everyday lives, but we do want a government that is capable and prepared to act to protect the lives and livelihoods of all Americans when crisis hits. Pete Sessions was in Congress for the last two decades. He did not build that government. We can't let him back in. That's why we need to run a robust campaign that reaches hundreds of thousands of people. That's why I need your help today. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Be safe, and thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Mary Mancini
subject: good leadership matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
I’ve said it before, but leadership matters – and right now that has never been more true . All across the world we are watching the successes and failures of different countries’ approaches in dealing with this pandemic. There are leaders that listened to science and made tough choices – and there are leaders that didn’t. It’s the same in the United States, and it’s the same in Tennessee.
In spite of data driven models and medical professionals’ warnings, Bill Lee has decided it’s time to go back to normal! He knows this will mean more cases, overcrowded medical facilities, and deaths. He knows how many Tennesseans live without adequate health insurance. He knows how many Tennesseans don’t have easy access to healthcare thanks to rural hospital closures. But he doesn’t care.
The latest research from Vanderbilt University says if we keep up current social distancing measures for a while longer, Tennessee can be a success story. If we don’t, we won’t. It’s not complicated.
We not only have an opportunity this November, we have a duty. We need to take back the power from the reckless GOP fools in charge and elect leadership that will put people before politics.
The TNDP staff has done an incredible job in shifting our efforts to navigate these uncertain times. We’ve been able to stay ahead of the curve, but only because of the unprecedented support from Tennessee Democrats. I’m asking you to continue giving us the resources we need to support democratic candidates across the state, and provide them with the tools they need to win.
We haven’t met our April fundraising goal and we need your help. To be blunt, we have three days to raise $7,890. Continuing to offer critical tools and resources to democratic candidates is how we will win this November.
Will you make a donation right now and help us reach our goal? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

clean_body: [] Peter, I’ve said it before, but leadership matters – and right now that has never been more true . All across the world we are watching the successes and failures of different countries’ approaches in dealing with this pandemic. There are leaders that listened to science and made tough choices – and there are leaders that didn’t. It’s the same in the United States, and it’s the same in Tennessee. In spite of data driven models and medical professionals’ warnings, Bill Lee has decided it’s time to go back to normal! He knows this will mean more cases, overcrowded medical facilities, and deaths. He knows how many Tennesseans live without adequate health insurance. He knows how many Tennesseans don’t have easy access to healthcare thanks to rural hospital closures. But he doesn’t care. The latest research from Vanderbilt University says if we keep up current social distancing measures for a while longer, Tennessee can be a success story. If we don’t, we won’t. It’s not complicated. We not only have an opportunity this November, we have a duty. We need to take back the power from the reckless GOP fools in charge and elect leadership that will put people before politics. The TNDP staff has done an incredible job in shifting our efforts to navigate these uncertain times. We’ve been able to stay ahead of the curve, but only because of the unprecedented support from Tennessee Democrats. I’m asking you to continue giving us the resources we need to support democratic candidates across the state, and provide them with the tools they need to win. We haven’t met our April fundraising goal and we need your help. To be blunt, we have three days to raise $7,890. Continuing to offer critical tools and resources to democratic candidates is how we will win this November. Will you make a donation right now and help us reach our goal? [] [] Thank you, [] -- Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. body:
This number represents the movement we’re building right here in Kentucky: teachers, fast food workers, coal miners, nurses, students, and believers in change are coming together and chipping in whatever they can to help defeat Mitch and elect Charles.
#
**Will you chip in $19.27 to help us reach our April fundraising goal?** _(Keep reading and we’ll tell you why this amount)_ ****[Chip in $19.27](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17293533/189606601/984430130?refcode=em20200428-1&amount=19.27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTg0MjI3NC03MDg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EGYE0QvOnY-jjEaC9ngk2VhiAY2T3J90OrWU4Tx99c8=)****
---
Let me explain. We’re proud to say that on an email like this, our average online donation is $19.27.
That might not seem like a lot, **but there’s a lot of power in that number. **
This number represents the movement we’re building right here in Kentucky: teachers, fast food workers, coal, miners, nurses, students, and believers in change are coming together and chipping in whatever they can to help defeat Mitch and elect Charles.
**That’s powerful.** If we keep fighting like this, putting our $19.27 donations together — we’re confident we can transform our Senate and end Mitch’s reign.
It’s critical we build our momentum, especially when we’re so close to the primary on June 23. So we’re racing to find 500 grassroots supporters to chip in to our campaign and invest in our progressive movement.
**[Will you chip in $19.27 or anything you can to help make sure our campaign hits our April fundraising goal of 500 grassroots donors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17293547/189606615/984430130?refcode=em20200428-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTg0MjI3NC03MDg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EGYE0QvOnY-jjEaC9ngk2VhiAY2T3J90OrWU4Tx99c8=)**
****[Contribute $19.27](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17293548/189606616/984430130?refcode=em20200428-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTg0MjI3NC03MDg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EGYE0QvOnY-jjEaC9ngk2VhiAY2T3J90OrWU4Tx99c8=)****
$19.27 may not be a lot compared to the average donations of other campaigns — but that’s what sets Team Booker apart.
We’re creating a movement that represents the many and not the few. That’s why we don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests.
We believe this kind of strategy is our strongest chance to mobilize thousands of voters in November, defeat Mitch McConnell, and win back the Senate in 2020.
**But it also means we’re really relying on grassroots supporters like you to help out as we prepare to fight for our campaign’s future on June 23. **
**[Will you give $19.27 or anything you can today to help us hit our 500 grassroots donors goal? Every little bit counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17293549/189606617/984430130?refcode=em20200428-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTg0MjI3NC03MDg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EGYE0QvOnY-jjEaC9ngk2VhiAY2T3J90OrWU4Tx99c8=)**
Together,

clean_body: This number represents the movement we’re building right here in Kentucky: teachers, fast food workers, coal miners, nurses, students, and believers in change are coming together and chipping in whatever they can to help defeat Mitch and elect Charles. Will you chip in $19.27 to help us reach our April fundraising goal? (Keep reading and we’ll tell you why this amount) **= Let me explain. We’re proud to say that on an email like this, our average online donation is $19.27. That might not seem like a lot, but there’s a lot of power in that number. This number represents the movement we’re building right here in Kentucky: teachers, fast food workers, coal, miners, nurses, students, and believers in change are coming together and chipping in whatever they can to help defeat Mitch and elect Charles. That’s powerful. If we keep fighting like this, putting our $19.27 donations together — we’re confident we can transform our Senate and end Mitch’s reign. It’s critical we build our momentum, especially when we’re so close to the primary on June 23. So we’re racing to find 500 grassroots supporters to chip in to our campaign and invest in our progressive movement. = = $19.27 may not be a lot compared to the average donations of other campaigns — but that’s what sets Team Booker apart. We’re creating a movement that represents the many and not the few. That’s why we don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests. We believe this kind of strategy is our strongest chance to mobilize thousands of voters in November, defeat Mitch McConnell, and win back the Senate in 2020. But it also means we’re really relying on grassroots supporters like you to help out as we prepare to fight for our campaign’s future on June 23. = Together, Team Booker =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Watch our first TV ad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Georgia’s first televised Democratic primary debate for the United States Senate is less than one week away. | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17294782/189626286/-1642649896?refcode=em042820-header&refcode2=560b5f50-7789-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjBiNWY1MC03Nzg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WM98mPtO4O7rHZ_Jb84p4XvXr7qPLjldjM60JJiIADM=) **** | | Georgia’s first televised Democratic primary debate for the United States Senate is less than one week away, team, and our campaign is in a fierce competition for airtime as thousands of Georgia voters tune in to this race.

We also find ourselves in a fierce crisis, and Teresa is calling out Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Brian Kemp for their risky, dangerous, ideological actions. And while we fight our invisible enemy, our Invisible Senator, David Perdue, fails to lead — instead, he’s tripled his stock trading with insider coronavirus information while Americans suffer not just physically, but economically.

**Starting today, we are airing our first TV ad “Invisible” to show that Teresa is the proven leader we need.** As this primary moves to the television screen — the most expensive advertising platform, and one of the most important as in-person campaigning has completely stopped — we’re counting on your grassroots donations more than ever.

[**Watch our first TV ad “Invisible,” and if you are able, make a donation toward our $25,000 April deadline goal to keep it running. Peter,

We're coming up on another important end-of-month goal, and it's times like this that remind us how grateful we are for our team of **tens of thousands of grassroots donors** who pitch in to keep us going!

While **Sen. Cornyn has taken enormous sums from Big Pharma, the insurance industry, and the gun lobby -- among countless other special interests** \-- MJ is doing things differently. She's not taking a DIME from corporate PACs, instead choosing to count on grassroots supporters to power her campaign.

Texans need a senator who puts their interests ahead of the biggest donors, and Sen. Cornyn fails the test. But **MJ 's entire life has been about fighting for what's right,** from flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on DC politicians _and_ the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women.

**Now that mission continues as MJ works to help flip the Senate -- but she needs your help! Will you make a MATCHED donation, if you can, to help us reach our $60,000 end-of-month goal and defeat Sen. Cornyn this November?**

name: Karl Rove
subject: need quick help
body:
Friend, A lot's happened this last month. As America fights to recover from COVID-19, the race towards the November general election heated up though you may have missed some things that flew under the radar and require your help to overcome. clean_body: For the last two years, Nancy Pelosi and her socialist allies have wasted millions of hard-earned taxpayer dollars to promote their own radical ideas like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, abortion on demand, and more. == Friend, For the last two years, Nancy Pelosi and her socialist allies have wasted millions of hard-earned taxpayer dollars to promote their own radical ideas like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, abortion on demand, and more. Now Democrats are targeting Ann Wagner. As a strong advocate for President Trump's America First agenda, Ann has been on the front lines in Congress fighting for pro-business policies, strong national security, and the protection of life at all stages. Protecting Ann's seat from the radical left is critical. That's why I have authorized my team to unlock == to help her protect her seat. == == == == == == == Nancy Pelosi is spending millions to flip her seat. Ann has proven time and again that she always put Missourians and the American people over political games. We need her in Congress to continue pushing a conservative agenda and finally put an end to the Radical Left's political games. This election is critical. President Trump is on the ballot and we have the ability to take back the House for Republicans. This is our chance to stop radical Democrats in their tracks. I hope Ann and I can count on your support, Friend. Thank you, Steve Scalise Republican Whip == == == == == == == Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress PO Box 50 Ballwin, MO 63022 == | | Ann Wagner for Congress | PO Box 50, Ballwin, MO 63022 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: My Faith Votes
subject: For those who need hope!
body:
| | Get common-sense, daily news in your inbox
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200428com01&n=1)
| Peter, One thing that has become clear during these tough times is how resilient America is. People have banded together, many of them motivated by their faith, to help out neighbors and even strangers. Unfortunately, though, much of the media is either glossing over those stories or outright ignoring them. **That’s why we’re excited to tell you about a new**[daily news email](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200428com01&n=2)**for people who not only want to stay informed, but also want hope!** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200428com01&n=3) It's called "Up First," and it's from The First, a network dedicated to true ideas, fresh voices, and the American values that this country was founded on. Every morning our friends at The First not only send out the essential stories you need to start your day, but they also include an entire special section dedicated to good news. And during this time, that’s so needed! We encourage you to check it out right now. Not only will you get news from a true conservative perspective, but you’ll also be reminded about the good that’s happening around us every day. So sign up for the Up First email today and put some hope back into your inbox! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200428com01&n=4) _P.S. In addition to signing up to receive the daily newsletter, you can also watch the new network 100% FREE_[ _here_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200428com01&n=5) _. No gimmicks. No trials. No lies. It features Dana Loesch, Buck Sexton, Jesse Kelly, and Mike Slater. You'll find everything you need to watch when you click the button above._ My Faith Votes

body:
It's Sam Pritchard, Joni's Campaign Manager here. I'm reaching out because this month has been one of the biggest yet in terms of momentum for our campaign. But, it's also been a big month for Chuck Schumer and his handpicked candidate
Hey Friend, it's Sam Pritchard, Joni's Campaign Manager here.

I'm reaching out because this month has been one of the biggest yet in terms of momentum for our campaign. But, it's also been a big month for Chuck Schumer and his handpicked candidate...

**First** , Chuck Schumer admitted Iowa's Senate seat is his best chance to flip the majority.

**After** , Schumer's handpicked candidate broke fundraising RECORDS in Iowa.

**Then** , Iowa's Senate seat slipped from Likely-R to Lean-R.

**Now** , Democrats have amplified their attacks and announced their plan to do whatever it takes to flip this seat -- including a new $13.1 MILLION pledge to elect their far-Left handpicked candidate.

**Chuck Schumer is well on his way to buying Iowa 's Senate seat outright**, and it's up to us to stop his momentum before it's too late.

We are facing our next critical fundraising deadline in TWO DAYS, and to be honest, we're going to need a boost in support in order to meet our goal. _**Could you give $5, $10, or even $25 to help us close the gap?**_

[Give $25](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K9fPdTU7wbbCXmc9j4eAhr-EFua0mGllwYrz2TB6z0xXDx17imZQ83QYdWQ0MUAbBz7OlUw8O8t2CTUrv27wDncWkkfIgTrNhqgkoibXt9A-lD6yf_oQpIX3f3RGZ7YBWaxT-eC7CLqSWCLUjK0Ps3bt7BxOORXkdrTytR4BHaoPtIncvQ03jd9L_x6Gk5JUF9LMzws7fyo9HilsVcH0wcK_vCfehPBYXI3rX-x6CLtMt5eRXioWFPgK_uUNgX1giQLO88C6zjBYbGvZ-y9PPDfpbVQ4_p2Vhk2yKKDcihL1SU1D0Og0jMQWPHCuwWtbr_VBfcr7d4gMwt3Zq1-vz1wNAsTDA29AFZWX3VToku31AWQUtFSKCg==&c=Ej_uahBChXCLSqWm5ErcyjSguoeRmcdlbL1y_56KvKI1c1DiN6LSfQ==&ch=US5JKNxy1zLYhT6PxBROAk9vPr1iejqZmVS8jwO__T6AkfWhkC7J4g==)
[Give $10 ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K9fPdTU7wbbCXmc9j4eAhr-EFua0mGllwYrz2TB6z0xXDx17imZQ80wD5uRsis3pjkJh8yuiZJoy9byuF7lkXqKMVAfXYhJY2tPiDQ0f7hF7cJHK6amDMECh1XaX5p7OS-ID9KCl8xvJ40UXmskLsky00vtWaU7Y73hC7w2aM0b84O1aLbcTNVKXutmLJyRe99L8mQGT3FdmO_Vrb7ecWrr0_-740DHKPizD7N9XAR4Bm8hUTx4ux1J44kVs2lgIdUYW-81YWTb96X97Bbg5NIZ8nYC5yTR609p9z1dfN6Dv6j6Xa1uhOrkCAgoLy2nFsRxOlXolnTKv4pXNAN8V0215FJ_W1N-jUM2bq6sx5YoR8fcp0SdiDw==&c=Ej_uahBChXCLSqWm5ErcyjSguoeRmcdlbL1y_56KvKI1c1DiN6LSfQ==&ch=US5JKNxy1zLYhT6PxBROAk9vPr1iejqZmVS8jwO__T6AkfWhkC7J4g==)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: MJI files lawsuit over Jackson’s order suspending open carry on behalf of Rep. Dana Criswell
body:
MJI files lawsuit over Jackson’s order suspending open carry on behalf on Rep. Dana Criswell|
---|---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/h9UtRz_6rTgFG9ixha9ZqyK_FB9pxTIxwMQXK9RHWClLQMlE4nzthI56lc6JbYLwfFzZZsRgQYYKill67qHa9XJrxOa8cWHtQVYJk7vNHtFO7JdADIVhP79KkrziypT050WkleQb5H-09tDxvMysHJt0CCirSN12uu-E3UOE0ScQWewKl2LI85__)
---
| | | |
---
**MJI files lawsuit over Jackson’s order suspending open carry**
| |
---
| | | |
---
**For Immediate Release**
CONTACT: Brett Kittredge, [kittredge@mspolicy.org](mailto:kittredge@mspolicy.org) MJI files lawsuit over Jackson’s order suspending open carry Jackson, Miss. – The city of Jackson cannot restrict your right to openly carry a firearm, whether we are under an emergency order or not. The Mississippi Justice Institute (“MJI”), a non-profit constitutional litigation center and the legal arm of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy (“MCPP”), has filed a lawsuit against this against this unconstitutional and illegal action on behalf of State Rep. Dana Criswell. On Saturday, Jackson Mayor Chokwe Antar Lumumba signed an executive order attempting to override constitutional rights and state law in order to prohibit open carry in the city. “A serious pandemic is not an opportunity for unconstitutional virtue signaling by grandstanding politicians,” said Aaron Rice, the Director of the Mississippi Justice Institute. “Mayor Lumumba has exploited the present public health crisis as a pretext to target law abiding people who are exercising their constitutional rights.” "As a citizen of the great state of Mississippi who has regular business in our capital city of Jackson, I was shocked by the recent announcement by Mayor Lumumba,” said Criswell. “I take the protection of myself and my family very seriously and believe deeply in the constitutional right to keep and bear arms. The mayor’s attempt to disarm me and deny me the ability of self-defense puts me and my family in danger anytime we are in Jackson.” The U.S. Constitution and the Mississippi Constitution protect the right to openly carry firearms in public for self-defense, as do Mississippi statutes. A mayor does not have the authority to override these constitutional rights, even during a state of emergency. “I have been honored to serve as an MCPP Contributing Fellow, and this lawsuit is precisely the type of important work that drew me to volunteer with MCPP and MJI in the first place,” said MJI volunteer attorney, Sterling Kidd. “The government must respect all citizens’ Constitutional right to protect themselves; arguably, a time of crisis is when that right is most important.” “While we are deeply saddened by the horrific crimes that have occurred in Jackson, those crimes have nothing to do with the current public health crisis or the right to openly carry a firearm in public for self-defense,” said Rice. “Mississippians should know that when the government tries to take away your constitutional rights, MJI will always be in your corner to help you fight back.” The lawsuit was filed in the U.S. District Court of the Southern District of Mississippi. Please note that the lawsuit was filed this last night and a copy will be posted at mspolicy.org and on Twitter when it is made available by the courts. ### MJI Director Aaron Rice is available for video interviews via FaceTime or Zoom. Please respond to this [email](mailto:kittredge@mspolicy.org) to coordinate a time.
| [Learn More about Mississippi Justice Institute](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/4kNY5V_zB6hu7ivHrFPT7Y-bCHebzrnSwdrfpZbJnw8U4a7rIuUSKmHYKx8PE-WWRWq6glkSQG3QppIWxWzYXWHJrAJI5hOmNU-klMkOvNZ-DHR105AYowvQLXkEt5Bx13z2S4_9AslPb0rv_Ng7yNoBbV174ijYRS0ln16uo6LuHN5QkQ)

We've all been watching Katie Porter fight boldly for the American people -- and it turns out Sen. Warren has been watching right alongside us!
When Katie confronted Trump's CDC official, she did her homework and didn't back down -- **and entirely thanks to her, the CDC has promised free coronavirus testing for everyone.**
And who could forget Katie's latest viral moment??
[](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_porternonsplit_apr?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200427_WarrenEndorsement_U1_X2&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200427_WarrenEndorsement_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200427_WarrenEndorsement_U1_X2")
**But Peter, it isn 't all good news.**
The GOP is _already_ **SMEARING** Elizabeth Warren's endorsement!!
They're fear-mongering about a "socialist agenda" and LYING about these women's accomplishments.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: US Passes South Korea in Virus Testing as Trump Unveils Expanded Effort
body:
Over 5 million tests have been conducted in America to date, thanks to close partnership between the Trump Administration and the private sector. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a207428be2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **US Passes South Korea in Virus Testing as Trump Unveils Expanded Effort**

“The United States has passed South Korea, considered the gold standard by the media, in testing for the coronavirus, and, in hot spots like New York City, has done several times more per capita than the Asian nation,” Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

Over 5 million tests have been conducted in America to date, thanks to close partnership between the Trump Administration and the private sector.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5faf10ebb0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The president’s all-of-America approach has meant federal agencies working hand in hand with state and local governments to slow the virus’ spread. The president will use that same approach to take the next step: protecting Americans while we open our country again,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2dccd4bd31&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The Trump Administration has “announced an unprecedented regulatory relief package to equip the American health care system with maximum flexibility to care for COVID-19 patients . . . The strategy essentially reimagines what constitutes a hospital for the duration of the emergency,” CMS Administrator Seema Verma writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf7249ff8a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The Trump-Russia collusion narrative collapsed a year ago with the Robert Mueller report, but the story’s not over. Democrats are now trying to suppress details of how the bogus theory was promoted, led by House Intelligence Chairman Adam Schiff . . . Now that the evidence is ready for public release, he’s defying the unanimous vote of a bipartisan committee to make them public,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9578f7d276&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae46e8c366&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9798a28682&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c358b5ab46)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Hirsh Singh: “Open Up The New Jersey Economy”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
According to Singh, New Jersey is quickly approaching a “point of no return” for the American economy and way of life, as six hundred... | | | Dear Friend,

New Jersey is the backbone of the American economy. Millions are counting on our farms, factories and supply lines.

I say it's time for us to get back to work. Take a look at my team's press release below, and consider [_making a contribution to our campaign_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=8b54f3cf8f&e=3e017fab0f) if you want to help us fight back.

-Hirsh

| [KEEP AMERICA GREAT](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=7ada4d4216&e=3e017fab0f "KEEP AMERICA GREAT")

| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=3cf2aec062&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| April 28th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Hirsh Singh: “Open Up The New Jersey Economy”

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Republican candidate for U.S. Senate Hirsh Singh called for the calibrated reopening of the New Jersey economy and ending the lockdown of the state. While speaking to his supporters, Singh presented his plan that would not only open up the economy, but also help contain the spread of COVID-19.

According to Singh's plan, we should continue all efforts to contain and control the virus in the areas that have been hit the hardest, but in areas where we have healthy low-risk individuals able to work and which have not been as seriously hit as the areas adjoining New York City, we must immediately start reopening for humanitarian, constitutional, and economic reasons even as we put social distancing norms into place and maintain such norms.

"COVID-19 is deadly and must be taken seriously, but there is no value in burning down the metaphorical village to save it. Quarantine used to be for sick people, now it is being used wrongly for healthy people," said Singh.

According to Singh, we are quickly approaching a “point of no return” for the economy and American way of life, as almost 26 million people are now unemployed due to the COVID-19 lockdown. As the United States, unlike many other nations in the world, is not dependent on a public transportation system, maintaining such social distancing measures “can be achieved,” he added.

Singh pointed to the examples of societies in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and the Czech Republic, all of which are maintaining safe social distancing without crippling their economies. He specifically pointed out that Taiwan was exposed weeks before New York City and has a greater population than NYC and the North Jersey regions but has only a fraction of the COVID-19 incidents. "The U.S. should be leading. Instead, we have orchestrated a depression," said Singh.

Turning to the effects of the lockdown, Singh stated that it is the middle class and the poor who are being utterly crushed by this economic shutdown.

“People are running out of credit and cash reserves, while small businesses of all sorts are going to cease to exist if re-opening doesn't occur. Bailouts and stimulus checks in perpetuity are not sustainable and are utterly inconsistent with the free enterprise system and American way of life.”

Singh then predicted how the bottom would fall out of the economy, saying that “the stimulus checks in areas like New Jersey are worth less than an average location's monthly rent. Mortgages, rent payments, car payments will default, and banks will fail due to this. We could even see a breakdown of law and order as people won't be able to buy food. The lockdown could also lead to an artificial famine as we are seeing a breakdown of the food supply chain.”

Singh ended his talk by saying that following our Founding Fathers has always been the best approach to handling problems and right now is no different. He pointed out that the lockdown was in direct violation of the United States Constitution and called for the stay at home order to end.
###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9bd4c45008&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9e94dc1451&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Charlie Blaettler
subject: Making budget cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
With the election 8 weeks away, our team has to make a lot of important strategy decisions this week. One of the biggest decisions we have to make is determining the size of our voter universe. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31b/kWxUDWgoT_K8z429eT1Byw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLn57cUmfkMGHeTl6JjC9sTVBGh1HFRa3tfQQ9yQi5CvJqF2isjvXq78PtdlVZKtMqtLJuZz4D1aac9GrYju-2FXLkjsqY3qn8HN5yO19mVFm3PMcIvZH3ZlznkIkTPSGfP-2Bhzl-2FLPHhpl-2BXQCEbRX091mDsmgm7rnX8G7uSNV1YUcPfxkC7J-2BxFBgCl82ZhThBgVEmtInone-2FSJW613dVgatX6todSTm9sFXFknQbNo8yXd9Yd2-2FePboCH8n2JXALFgCynC1lxuNVtMAC85DaUnW/Zihg) Friend, **** **** **** With the election 8 weeks away, our team has to make a lot of important strategy decisions this week. One of the biggest decisions we have to make is determining the size of our voter universe. In other words, we are trying to determine just how many Democratic voters we can afford to reach by mail, digital ads, phone calls, and texts.
We would love to send lots of mail, air lots of ads, make lots of phone calls, and send lots of texts to every voter in the district so that everyone can hear Mondaire’s message. But that’s just not possible. Instead, we must be strategic with our spending.
We have a plan in mind, but currently we’re $7,560 away from our end-of-month fundraising goal that will allow us to cover that budget. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us communicate with every voter we need to talk to?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31b/kWxUDWgoT_K8z429eT1Byw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLn57cUmfkMGHeTl6JjC9sTVBGh1HFRa3tfQQ9yQi5CvNXElSw8uDJbsIgactn80yl5wNxzooWuhwjUtnQCdjh-2BpbRmy9raU-2Fix1gZiYzY3gElMvQ3zQ5Rhu6m6GOza58Lanc-2F4lSktqZgXBxLsg3xqgBGE5IVqzOXfk5JiIwL1XbzZq4rejwlXpMHBcWJV3jo-2B38Z7AyTxZ2kYWfP5-2BEzVP-2FT8BvWXEp82ncahoWzy23ctMgRLwkm-2FXW7qpPRYr68j3MhsTtqEtnSlioP54-2FSk/aOdY)_**
We can’t self-fund with millions of dollars and we don’t accept donations from corporate PACs or fossil fuel lobbyists, unlike several of our opponents. In fact, 80% of our donations are small-dollar contributions of $200 or less. We count on emails like this one to help us hit our goals and raise the money we need to execute our strategy. **_[Will you chip in right now so we can move forward with the plan we have?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31b/kWxUDWgoT_K8z429eT1Byw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLn57cUmfkMGHeTl6JjC9sTVBGh1HFRa3tfQQ9yQi5CvIjco4VgOudqJm9zSHBdtSgJdDWhf2HhtpJDNEn4cj-2F-2F862HXsYb8UCz3SO2kMZV6EW4-2Bcds2VRXvKlU7Hcmi9RA-2BITgC0MTJmMcke5EpoXKJ0fyb2DJO0RF0lKYFfn-2FapCC-2BjJhHUrkk3JY-2BJnANz8cI-2B9-2BL4ys7-2BOdOk8zaOCDsx5ikhTlujlVdtClfwOYDXdYDiaDHbohkinWHNbV2tlAykescSehQGjsUBoVDPdA/VXLr)_**
This week is one of the most important weeks of our campaign. The decisions we make now determine our strategy for the final 8 weeks of the race. We know what we need to do to win -- we just need the resources. **_[Can you donate today to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31b/kWxUDWgoT_K8z429eT1Byw/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLn57cUmfkMGHeTl6JjC9sTVBGh1HFRa3tfQQ9yQi5CvCmkzCDsgcvCXjahaQvlE9RNPcrE5aBaR8tHsTE4cFczsRjWwmUShpJ8BZLkS-2BrPG4p-2BvwBrA7I0wRkWeE3qWhlXBHQNgAC-2FAQC4l2kSnlgmxa-2FboS34aySToiqX7qjuP2hAmFXVmeKimlu9pcPnpVThZwad2Iww7Y3ctWmW26xKx8DmWnND6H3eIk3kR-2BCJh0ZIEJdN83uQQ1Ltrws6-2FjaOtac3ftiDcoIUPbJHlOYo/ntwW)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31b/kWxUDWgoT_K8z429eT1Byw/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLn57cUmfkMGHeTl6JjC9sTVBGh1HFRa3tfQQ9yQi5CvAMh9Wfs970vx-2FiQahQabAg5guC16ZpTHda7Xr5-2B7p3aHxDLtKdZ28nz2OeXMMrPN9pZW1kNf3R-2B1KYFfXE3yB4Q5eV2uR-2B4mt1tCCicvAbFDmovPtHOe2kd9XF5bhAMPcBQwaClJYDNfUUs3JFjy6gKuAV9Rh-2B09dvkfQ4QZVwMj3-2BOBhliTUYywHgDRvH2pGvK6oPzh5RYcwGVMYa-2F6CrnzC8-2BBlk6F-2BW1KUk3J5cn/md0j)
Thank you, Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Help Joni Ernst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Standing up to China is the most important issue of our time. And if we want to take on China, we need to make sure that we have elected officials who care more about our national security than being politically correct. That is why I am writing on behalf of my friend, Senator Joni Ernst.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42374628&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkxODMzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Standing up to China is the most important issue of our time. And if we want to take on China, we need to make sure that we have elected officials who care more about our national security than being politically correct.

That is why I am writing on behalf of my friend, Senator Joni Ernst.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDIzNzQ2MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkxODMzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Joni is one of my closest allies in taking on the murderous Chinese Communist Party.

But now she's a target herself -- liberal Democrats are pouring millions of dollars into Iowa to try to beat her. Because they know if they can replace Joni with a socialist, they'll take back the Senate so they can have open borders and sanctuary cities across the country.

Her race is shaping up to be the **single most competitive Senate race in the country. **

As a favor to me, [**will you please chip in to help Joni win in Iowa?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDIzNzQ2MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkxODMzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[**Donate NOW to help protect the Republican Senate Majority.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDIzNzQ2MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkxODMzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I'm going to be campaigning for Joni this fall in Iowa, but until then, we need to give her the resources she needs to WIN.

[**Will you join in this fight and help my friend Joni Ernst?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDIzNzQ2MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkxODMzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[**A donation of $50, $25, $10 or whatever you can afford will ensure we have the resources to fight back against Chuck Schumer and the mainstream media.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIzNzQ2MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkxODMzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Warren
subject: re: A phone call from Elizabeth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
When she was running for president, one of Elizabeth's favorite things to do was calling grassroots donors to say thank you. She talked with teachers, nurses, bus operators, and anyone who chipped in | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e918bd/4291178060/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When she was running for president, one of Elizabeth's favorite things to do was calling grassroots donors to say thank you.

She talked with teachers, nurses, bus operators, and anyone who chipped in -- even just $1 -- to help grow our grassroots movement.

She got to hear what was on their minds and what issues pulled them into this fight.

Some politicians rely on focus groups or lobbyists to tell them where to stand, but Elizabeth fights from the heart. And her phone calls with grassroots supporters gave her another chance to hear about how to make our country work for working families.

Plus, it's always nice to get a chance to say thank you.

So why stop now?

**[Elizabeth is going to call a few grassroots donors who chip in before Thursday's fundraising deadline. If you can, donate $2 or any amount right now, and you might be on the phone with Elizabeth soon.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e918bc/4291178060/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyNUZfRU9NX0RPQ19UXzIwMjAwNDI4X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ25F_EOM_DOC_T_20200428_V1S2_P")**

She'd want to hear about how you, your family, and your community are holding up during this crisis. And you could talk with her about how we can rebuild our country while putting people, not billionaires and giant corporations, first.

We could all use a little more connection these days. And even if she doesn't get a chance to tell you this herself, Elizabeth would want you to know that she's grateful for everything you do.

Side by side, we're going to root out corruption and put power in the hands of working people. But it's only possible if we stay in this fight.

**[If making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, please chip in any amount to help hit our April fundraising goal, and keep your phone close-- because Elizabeth might call you to say thanks for being a part of this.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e918bc/4291178060/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyNUZfRU9NX0RPQ19UXzIwMjAwNDI4X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ25F_EOM_DOC_T_20200428_V1S2_P")**

Thank you, and stay safe,

Warren Democrats
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e918bc/4291178060/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyNUZfRU9NX0RPQ19UXzIwMjAwNDI4X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ25F_EOM_DOC_T_20200428_V1S2_P")
---

P.S. We know that times are tough and not everyone can make a contribution right now, **[so you can also add your name here if you'd be interested in getting a call from Elizabeth.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91893/4291178060/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyNUZfRU9NX0RPQ19UXzIwMjAwNDI4X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-donor-calls?source=EMQ25F_EOM_DOC_T_20200428_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91892/4291178060/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91895/4291178060/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91894/4291178060/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91897/4291178060/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91896/4291178060/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e9/45c30650/1f500c9a6/66e91899/4291178060/VEsFAQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

body:
