| | __Money raised by VA Republicans through Q1 2020 ➡️ $8,825,227.84__ Derek --

You read that right. Collectively, Republican candidates across Virginia raised almost **NINE MILLION** dollars through the first quarter of 2020. Every penny is going toward turning our Commonwealth red, unseating our freshman representatives, and defeating Mark.

Today, we're asking you to join the fight to make sure that we keep Virginia blue, and protect all of the progress we've made in the Commonwealth. Until the end of the month, your contribution to keep Mark in the Senate fighting for us will be **doubled**. **[You have the chance to make double the impact-- can you help us out?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c9/53d9897e/54fd71ae/1c886a18/3625831394/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gop?refcode=20200428_f_1_nd__559__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

**If you were waiting for a sign that the Virginia GOP and Donald Trump 's re-election campaign are making a play for VA, this is it. **We know it's a difficult time for many, but it's never been clearer that we need leaders like Mark working hard to protect us. Right now, you can double your impact on Mark's race, and we'd really appreciate your support. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Jim Jordan is on TEAM SCHILLING!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/jim-jordan-is-on-team-schilling?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=837cf38af1&e=90fad69796)
---
| |
# **_We are honored to accept the endorsement of_ _ _**_**Congressman Jim Jordan!**_

Today, I am grateful to accept the endorsement of President Trump's most fierce supporter in congress; Congressman Jim Jordan of Ohio. I had the pleasure of serving alongside Congressman Jordan in the 112th congress. Jim is one of us, a real conservative that stands up for Republican values. I look forward to serving alongside him again, and to finally give the people of the 2nd district the representation they deserve.

This campaign has been a true grassroots movement, as summed up by Shane Vander Hart of The Caffeinated Thoughts Podcast when he said "Definitely seeing a grassroots vs. establishment divide w/ Republican endorsements in this primary. June 2nd will be interesting." Shane is absolutely right, we will continue to exceed expectations all the way to November where **WE WILL FLIP THIS SEAT RED. **

I need your help now more than ever. President Trump needs conservative Republicans with the backbone to fight the democratic establishment. NOT RHINOS! If you could help by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or even the max of $2,800; every dollar that you donate will go straight to fighting the Democratic Socialists and establishment RHINO's!
> _“Now more than ever it is vital to get reinforcements in Congress to help defend President Trump, and promote our conservative solutions to the challenges our country faces. **We need Bobby Schilling back in Congress working with us again.** ” - Jim Jordan_

For Iowa,

\- Bobby Schilling

subject: Chuck Schumer is gaining momentum

body:
Chuck Schumer has admitted that Minnesota will be one of the key states in order for Democrats to take over the Senate in 2020. Now, to ensure Democrats elect ultra-liberal Tina Smith and take the Senate Majority, he's pouring money into Minnesota in support of his handpicked candidate.

Chuck Schumer has admitted that **Minnesota will be one of the key states in order for Democrats to take over the Senate in 2020.**

Now, to ensure Democrats elect ultra-liberal Tina Smith and take the Senate Majority, he's pouring money into Minnesota in support of his handpicked candidate.

We can't wait any longer to fight back, or we'll lose the Majority. Trump-Endorsed Republican Jason Lewis needs your support in the fight to **FLIP MINNESOTA RED** and defend the Senate Majority.

We can't let Schumer and his far-Left cronies win. Now, more than ever, it is critical that we support a strong Conservative voice like Jason Lewis for Minnesota's Senate seat.

Friend,

Martha McSally is running against a far-left Democrat who has raked in millions from National Democrat donors. On top of that, Chuck Schumer's Super PAC is buying ads in hopes he can sway voters in her battleground states. **Democrats only need FOUR seats to flip the Senate, and if they win in Arizona, they could win it all.**

The end of month deadline is just 2 days away, and I need you to join me in supporting Martha right now. [**Stand with Martha and rush an emergency contribution NOW!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A2J338VW7oDVsg-O2rHo96UCSq0igdj_4qtAc9_SjLqO8AlguuNpAxf6XlLLNy9cRT0idEK9vC5rCHO5n7Gbf-mps2fcC41ygGP-cMJr1Autk13ZuyqV-PEvHp2BAgrZ9qB47BlluIs_sVdDceDietsT1vaS5LT1oB-_NgnIMrJZ5xV6phCTqhJS7RvH23SudosSiAgJCRkc-ehKwG12IW1aZ-Cq0MqypmaaqKIhtwEGFSULACwiQ9LVn_640Xv-VApULRwUIFsHj1WGYQilPpqDuARq_GwObGHL7LyYFW7oXQ3AHgBaE1Pw2xgSc3f76CJ1hCPjDgYHwYjDhFVNXPf30bsEpHkObul456FNrk6VDSl-vepZKUNgKnKusl4QPt6lfJ4VVNe395dexAUVWSzqSr9zhYvK&c=qh5DViUteF6eBKe-l40HOpR8CXFfl9eO18-kK8IBEhFDM6nVTJO2EA==&ch=DUZBeaahVPtGHPvy2flFBf2iL2lSo2X4yCYyy-NN5T-ctT_xdWBZEQ==)

The Left knows they NEED to win Arizona. Martha's opponent has $9.5 Million in cash on hand at his disposal - **nearly double what the top Republicans have.** We need to help Martha make up ground now or we could face the consequences in November.

**Martha is a fearless conservative and one of my father 's top allies! Join me in standing with Martha before it's too late.**

body:
It's Josh, Susan's campaign co-chairman. I have been with Susan Collins since the beginning. And Peter, when Susan first ran to become Maine's Senator, I knew she would make our state and country a better place. She has not once let me down. Susan puts people above politics -- it's just who she is. She cares about getting things done. Her record proves it. And right now, Susan Collins needs your help.

Hey Peter,
It's Josh, Susan's campaign co-chairman. I have been with Susan Collins since the beginning. And Peter, when Susan first ran to become Maine's Senator, I knew she would make our state and country a better place. _**She has not once let me down.**_
Susan puts people above politics -- it's just who she is. She cares about getting things done. Her record proves it. And right now, Susan Collins needs your help.
**Susan 's April deadline is only 2 days away, and we are still $100,000 short of reaching her goal.** [**Please contribute giving anything you can afford to Susan 's campaign to help her get there!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIzNzU1MjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkyMzU2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
While Susan works tirelessly for Mainers, Chuck Schumer and the candidate he HANDPICKED to run against her continue to spread misinformation about her record and falsely attack her character. We must fight back against their absurd politics!
**[GIVE $5](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIzNzU1MjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjkyMzU2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: We're matching donations

body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/1319bfd3cc975a01c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Are you hanging in there OK with the coronavirus lockdown? I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these unprecedented times. It’s certainly changed the way we do things when it comes to campaigning, to say the least. Normally I love getting out and meeting people, and shaking the hands of the good citizens who put me in office and trusted me to represent them in Congress. It’s obviously just not possible to do that now, as we are all practicing social distancing to help flatten the curve and protect our most vulnerable citizens. With the spread of COVID-19, we have moved all our campaign operations online, and are relying on your help to keep our momentum going. And we have amazing news! We have a generous donor who has agreed to match all fundraising from now until 11:59 PM on April 30. Will you donate today to double your impact and keep our momentum going? Being nearly 100 percent digital has caused an urgent need to meet our fundraising goals. We want to get a new ad up and get it in front of as many people as possible, and we need your help to make that happen. **Can you contribute today?** **[Contribute $5>>> Make a $10 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/d1851aec47666facc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** **[Contribute $25>>> Make a $50 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/fb1a9b4c63449723c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** **[Contribute $50>>> Make a $100 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/149223d7d340ef4ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)** **[Contribute $100>>> Make a $200 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/da8893bd331cfb85c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** [**Contribute $250 >>> Make a $500 Impact**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/99eac21e2b2ea1afc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Thank you so much for your help and support. Elections are still moving forward, and we need to make sure we keep this seat RED! -Kevin Hern _P.S. During these turbulent times, I want to make sure you’re taking care of yourself and your family first. Please only give if you are able to do so. Thank you so much!_ [ **Donate NOW >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/b34f65d891f8544ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/d76157384cbf70b3c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d782cea7a8b40acf/d050207f9a087959c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

body:
I just got off the phone with our finance director, and he informed me that we're still lagging behind our April fundraising goal by just over $8,000.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/0OKXTxldCjw8ktWolhPrfqVDDHNwbYODagj-rUnyieo=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

I just got off the phone with our finance director, and he informed me that we're still lagging behind our April fundraising goal by just over $8,000.

Like Sri mentioned in his email to you yesterday, ensuring we meet our benchmark goals for April will inform the plans we're able to execute in the coming month and beyond. **Coming up short now creates a domino effect which goes all the way to Election Day, team.** [**DONATE NOW TO HELP US MEET OUR APRIL GOAL!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/H43kCHzF7Rx1Q4YdkfNu654BdQ-VqjI32mpbE9mDaIg=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=15) | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=5)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=50)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=100)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

TX-22 is nationally recognized as one of the most competitive Congressional races in the entire country this election cycle. Pollsters, pundits and political leaders are predicting that the path to a House majority for either party will run squarely through our district. Furthermore, Rachel Bitecofer, an elections analyst, proclaimed this week that "Losing a slew of House races in the heart of the Republican Party's economic and political powerhouse..." would signal a permanent end to the conservative hold of the White House.

But this is more than just another high profile campaign, team. This is about creating a path forward for all Texans and their families.

While our Republican opponents continue their race to the bottom by making wild and outlandish statements in their party runoff -- our campaign remains focused on addressing the very real issues facing our community today. Fixing a broken healthcare system, solving our current economic crisis, and bringing common sense solutions to Washington are what Team Sri is all about.

Sri isn't running to grandstand -- he's running to stand up for you.

[**If you can, please take a moment to donate to our campaign as we approach our April 30th deadline. Anything you can give will go a long way.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/H43kCHzF7Rx1Q4YdkfNu654BdQ-VqjI32mpbE9mDaIg=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

Thank you,
Allen Chen
Campaign Manager

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/8rXzlpxr5Sdf_BBrrD1FUlr0H8GrqPhT0lRwnLXIZHk=/8XRewJTLzTk39zKTvEIvY8-guueYbpppDDi-h7IfG5w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.28_AC_b1_all&amount=15)

**Here 's why our campaign is having so much success right now:**
Folks see the need for new and fresh leadership. They know that the same "politics as usual" mentality isn't the recipe for winning elections. They know that in order to win, we ought to put someone on the ballot who has a strong record of serving our community.
**Francis has served his community all his life -- starting with his time defending our freedom in Iraq.**
We're racking up support from major organizations -- including VoteVets and Moms Demand Action, but in order for us to garner even more support, we need to show these groups that we have the muscle to win.
**[So please, add a donation to help us reach our $10,000 end-of-month goal. Even $5 or $10 helps us get closer to that goal.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4c5/388db0e9/8d71464/609ba4c4/394365524/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDQyOF9FT00xX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200428_EOM1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+So+please+add+a+donation+to+help+us+reac&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200428_EOM1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200428_EOM1_U1_X1")**
Thanks so much,
Will

name: Christy Smith
subject: No corporate PACs, only you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

It's hard to believe that there are only 2 weeks left before our special election day.

Folks in our district have 2 weeks to send in their ballots.

This means that we only have 2 weeks to put it all on the line and show the district why I'm the leader we need to get through this pandemic.

**[Can you chip in now and help save this seat? Anything you can give would be a huge help with so little time left.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e5/470292497/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1")**

A lot of negative ads and a lot of lies have been airing non-stop thanks to my opponent and his Republican dark money donors during this election, but what people need to know about me is this: **I will be a thoughtful, determined leader who will fight day-in and day-out for the people in this district.**

I will not be bought by lobbyist dollars or special interest groups -- that's why I've pledged to reject all donations from corporate PACs or lobbyists.

**[But that means I rely on folks like you putting together $5, $10, anything you can to give to my campaign to keep us going. So can you step up right now to help meet our lofty goal by Thursday night?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e5/470292497/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e6/470292497/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e7/470292497/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e0/470292497/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e1/470292497/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e2/470292497/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e5/470292497/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1")
Thank you so much for your continued support. It's hard to believe this election is in just 2 weeks, but I know that we'll be successful with you on my team.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb50/29776869/a572f19/569f61e5/470292497/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tNC1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom4-s1")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Endorsement Alert (via MichelleforKansas.com)
subject: EMILY's List just endorsed Michelle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

EMILY's List, the nation's largest resource for women in politics, has just endorsed Michelle De La Isla in her campaign for Kansas' 2nd District!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17298511/189695938/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12592&refcode=em20_200428_eom2_fnd_gq_act__ea_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200428_eom2_fnd_gq_act__ea_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTA3OTRiMC05NDg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxYZbkNw14ADkeZ-4UwM7dGhu6-zzxh0gaHhr0_KLBw=)
For 35 years, EMILY's List has helped pave the way for more women representation up and down the ballot. And their mission started with a simple acronym: "Early Money Is Like Yeast," it makes the dough rise.

EMILY's List is supporting Michelle because they know we can count on her to stand up for women all across Kansas' 2nd District, and ensure their voices are being lifted up in Congress.

**[Help us raise the dough we need to send Michelle to Congress. Chip in $10 or more before our end-of-month deadline on Thursday at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17298512/189695939/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12592&refcode=em20_200428_eom2_fnd_gq_act__ea_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200428_eom2_fnd_gq_act__ea_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTA3OTRiMC05NDg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxYZbkNw14ADkeZ-4UwM7dGhu6-zzxh0gaHhr0_KLBw=)**

body:

Will you sign immediately? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa62/3554253236/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200428_em_pet_b1_repoanvbrl_ia") | I can't overstate the urgency. Our post office is now inches from going bankrupt. [**If Trump and Republicans succeed in bankrupting the post office during this crisis, they 'll sabotage our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote them OUT of office.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa62/3554253236/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200428_em_pet_b1_repoanvbrl_ia")
[**_I need 20,000 signatures on my emergency petition to RESCUE the post office and STOP Trump and his Republicans from stealing this election from us. Will you sign ASAP? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa62/3554253236/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200428_em_pet_b1_repoanvbrl_ia")

I need you to read this very carefully.

\- Our post office is now inches from going bankrupt.
\- Trump just threatened to VETO emergency aid to save it.
[**\- He knows without the post office, our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote Republicans OUT -- will be ruined.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa62/3554253236/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200428_em_pet_b1_repoanvbrl_ia")

Hear me loud and clear:

I will NOT let Republicans use this crisis to sabotage our election.

[_**I need a MASSIVE uprising -- 20,000 signatures on my emergency petition. The post office is CRITICAL to ensuring we can safely vote by mail in this election. We cannot allow Trump to sabotage the post office and force Americans to choose between our health and our vote. Will you add your name before midnight? >>**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa62/3554253236/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200428_em_pet_b1_repoanvbrl_ia")

Ben Ray

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa66/3554253236/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa67/3554253236/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa64/3554253236/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa60/3554253236/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ac/18e32a7f/4fb0eafa/7b21fa65/3554253236/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

clean_body: | Hello — I’ll make this quick. Our April fundraising deadline is in two days and we’re well short of where we need to be to ensure our grassroots campaign has the resources to fight back against GOP attacks and flip this Senate seat. Everyone, from our Republican opponent and his right-wing billionaire backers to corporate lobbyists in Washington, is hoping we fail here. Falling short on our fundraising goals is exactly the kind of thing that could invite more attacks from McConnell’s dark money network. Even though we’ve canceled our in-person fundraising events during this pandemic, I am convinced we can catch up on our goals if grassroots supporters like you step up before the deadline: Please, will you make a contribution of $10 or more before our April fundraising deadline on Thursday? I’m not taking any money from corporate PACs, so the only way we can hit this goal is if you chip in: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I know I can count on you. I always have. Thanks in advance, — John Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

body:

Friend,

Friend, Yesterday, our team reached out to you about an important update ahead of our campaign's critical April fundraising deadline. Our finance team did the math and we told you that we needed $3,235 to reach the goal that we've set. And now, with just two days left until the end of the month deadline, we're happy to announce that we've now raised half of the $3,235 that is needed to reach the goal. We're so close to reaching our goal, Friend. body:
|
#
Hi there, I just hopped off a call with my finance team ahead of our first monthly deadline of Q2 and I have some bad news... **We are less than 48 hours away from closing the books and not on pace to hit our online fundraising goal.** I'm a little worried because our race is a top target for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their billionaire buddies who will spend whatever it takes to defeat me. If our campaign falls short on our fundraising goal, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is ripe for the taking. That's why it's so important we hit this target before the deadline expires — which means we need a surge of grassroots contributions in the next 48 hours from folks like you. So, I'm asking: **Can I count on you to donate ahead of our end-of-month deadline and help us get back on track? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In order to save Minnesota's Senate seat and bring Democrats one step closer to the majority, we need to build an organization that can win — and that starts with staying on top of every single one of our benchmarks. Thanks for everything. — Tina P.S. I understand this is a difficult time for everyone, so if you’d like to receive fewer emails during this public health emergency, Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: JoshHicksKY.com
subject: TUNE IN: Josh will be on Facebook Live at 7PM
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Hello, team!
Josh is holding a Facebook Live discussion on health care tonight at 7PM ET, and we wanted to share the event information with you so you could join in!
Here are the details:
WHO: Josh Hicks, candidate for KY-6, will be joined by Ron Gray, a healthcare professional. (And you!)
WHAT: A conversation about what healthcare workers are seeing on the front lines of this pandemic.
WHERE: On Josh’s Facebook page — facebook.com/JoshHicksKY. Like Josh’s page now and you’ll get a notification when he goes live.
Ron will share some perspective on what is going on in the healthcare industry — and how nurses and other healthcare professionals are being impacted by the pandemic.
This conversation is part of our Facebook Live series to hear from community leaders who are on the front lines of crisis response. It’s important to us, in times of crisis, to be there for one another and ask what we can do to help. I hope you can tune in to learn more!
If you have a question for Josh or Ron, you can submit it by replying to this email with your question, or leave a comment on the Facebook Live video once the event begins.
Hadley Rouse
Political Coordinator
Josh Hicks for Congress

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?amount=5&refcode=HIC_20200428_em_fblive_org_all_ftr2]

body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900e3/7f51f7bc/4fcde701/4ef177f6/2816059576/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter,
* **FIRST,** MJ took _first place_ in the Texas Senate primary.

* **THEN,** _The Dallas Morning News_ reported that "MJ Hegar has seized control of the Democratic race for the U.S. Senate" thanks to "superior fundraising [and] infrastructure."

* **NOW,** we need to capitalize on her momentum! All donations are being **MATCHED** ahead of our end-of-month deadline.

**[Contribute and DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900e3/7f51f7bc/4fcde701/4ef177f5/2816059576/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200428.2nd__1315__&amount=10")**
---
**MJ has something that Sen. Cornyn doesn't...and that's folks like YOU!**

When _The Dallas Morning News_ talks about our "superior fundraising," they're talking about our incredible grassroots team of over 42,000+ members!

MJ relies on your grassroots support, because _she isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs._ Our success comes from all of you who've pitched in to make this campaign possible -- now we need to keep this momentum going strong.

**[If you can, will you make a matched donation today to help us hit our end-of-month goal so we can elect MJ and flip the Senate in November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900e3/7f51f7bc/4fcde701/4ef177f5/2816059576/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200428.2nd__1315__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900e3/7f51f7bc/4fcde701/4ef177f5/2816059576/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200428.2nd__1315__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900e3/7f51f7bc/4fcde701/4ef177f4/2816059576/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1315&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900e3/7f51f7bc/4fcde701/4ef177eb/2816059576/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

body:
My name is Earletta Hearn. I’m Charles’ mother, and I’ve been his biggest supporter since day one.
#
Hi, it’s nice to meet you.
My name is Earletta Hearn. I’m Charles’ mother, and I’ve been his biggest supporter since day one.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299739/189725547/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)
I know Charles. I know he will work hard to make sure the voices of working class people in Kentucky and across the nation are heard, **because I’ve seen how hard he’s worked his entire life** — but he can’t do it alone. **[So please, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to support his campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299740/189725548/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)**
His campaign told me we’re trying to reach 500 donations from grassroots donors like yourself before the end of April, so I’m making this ask now.
****[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299753/189725561/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)****
Charles knows exactly what hardworking, everyday Kentuckians need. That’s because he’s had his fair share of living through some hard times. **I know, because most of those times I was right there with him. **
When Charles was growing up, we sometimes had to stretch to make ends meet and have enough food and medicine. It wasn’t easy, but by God’s grace, we survived.
Despite the odds, Charles went on to graduate from the University of Louisville, start a family of his own, and become the youngest Black state legislator in 90 years. And with our help, he can become the first Black senator from Kentucky.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299754/189725562/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)
**As a mother, it’s hard to express how proud I am in words, and how much it means to everyone in our community to see Charles lead this fight for working class people.** It’s incredible seeing how many people are rooting for my son as he works to bring change and give a voice to Kentuckians in the Senate.
So when Charles says he’s running to fight for all of us, I know how personal this fight is for him. He’s fought his entire life for a brighter future for our family, the families in our community, and now he’s running to advocate for your family too.
**[I hope you can help out Charles and his campaign to meet their fundraising goal by midnight on Thursday. His campaign staff told me that all we need is just 500 grassroots donations to show the strength of this movement, of any amount. Chip in now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299755/189725563/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299756/189725564/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)****
Sincerely,
Earletta

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17299757/189725565/984430129?refcode=em20200428-2-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ3ZmI3MC1hMTg5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLXzF_HS6knJCUU6fpuM-LVTlO0PGMfkI4p2bVH4zcg=)****

[**Can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can by midnight tonight to put us on the path to victory?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T6eiXbAutKZV5wPF1i-hjhlwvXQBNcPZnNfA4UM7SN-EwTgNbMa56MvM9CIQaamThgrxgUpLmu_azsUDY8bknM2pEZFU6co2L5h0CrS5d9OcAyfs8G7J5O3JVwUhAFqMmq_p_Be41vlvexsIQPXN0AKxTMfTL3vCzj5YYX8EN2OFQT4VSa-NoyU6oQ0Q3i2uoAICuIt2eNibVWoAI0qs2XmgqWUD8eLiptvbJcz33CwhKug5Y1b9qWbOAhqKOxRsJXdcTFEifaTc4D3dTva08HWuzhWSmMcIGwhqGPEWf4GLva5wQBaYMb7Ant3pH2GjN9Wh3NKlXPacV7sdFTgfFkcxOF5g0BhxqTbHZgZN3ucagMtGKVSxaG77z-XrsSnJ&c=4dZOaiWbaPi2u1OfHnrORpM8x0cRZXeQaTADcU0tBmozzHGibhtMNw==&ch=w6WmEoCrmfh7UREPorKFfTeSQWEgfyrCO8zzrO5ah99g6UdhyXfIVw==)

Flipping this seat is directly tied to grassroots supporters like you. This fight isn't just about one seat -- it's about retaking the House Majority, the future of our nation, and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda. It's about sending Michelle Steel -- the conservative fighter we need -- to Congress where she has pledged to fight against any new taxes and stop all tax increases.

If we let the Democrats win, they'll turn this seat blue for good. [**It 's up to us to keep that from happening, but we have to act now. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T6eiXbAutKZV5wPF1i-hjhlwvXQBNcPZnNfA4UM7SN-EwTgNbMa56Ntou-5wWm2jnRqRSTXpn_45n3seFoi0piTtI44bjkOwsKyAcD-djDjSn5FdCXwUjNLwcmqwVukTcfXjl0YrwR48vHlDQxtEtyI0aRmylNk9SpVn3vPdFR6-7qYBfCrq5TM9tjgc95za_l7gFyq8eSOmncblFUqymLxMT23fI27KoGZlG9Q6kdcUA4Sr72i4fTOGnzLaKBoW7TafYRkzNVgeaSC2J3gTj9Ezuz8L2updwiOnEagUfPgXtGv7zM_xCuxe41qNqJwbf9z5pgUyHK2MI7Gn62UGgrPK1fNBVFK9x5tRF7avI9dEVLZEqyQq5W-41U5gEztu&c=4dZOaiWbaPi2u1OfHnrORpM8x0cRZXeQaTADcU0tBmozzHGibhtMNw==&ch=w6WmEoCrmfh7UREPorKFfTeSQWEgfyrCO8zzrO5ah99g6UdhyXfIVw==)

Team Steel

name: Dr. Rene Bollier
subject: The first female doctor in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas

My wife Barbara is a problem solver and a leader. She’s exactly the type of person we need working for Kansas in the Senate. body:
---
| |
## Peter, Senate Republicans are a sinking ship.
**The Republican Senate campaign arm just released a memo telling their members to distance themselves from Trump.** **_And the Trump campaign is not happy about it..._** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d0/72412298/4fbde280/61048029/3755703009/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9hcHJpbCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNDI4X0dPUE1lbW9fVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200428_GOPMemo_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200428_GOPMemo_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200428_GOPMemo_U1_X1") clean_body: At this crucial moment for our country, President Trump is leading us through an unprecedented challenge Dear Peter, At this crucial moment for our country, President Trump is leading us through an unprecedented challenge, and with liberal Democrats like Kendra Horn attacking him at every turn, we must give our commander-in-chief support in Washington as soon as possible. You stand out amongst my most active supporters and one of Oklahoma's leading Republicans, so I am counting on you as we head into the heat of the election year. Our April fundraising deadline is approaching, and fast. Can I count on your support? We need your help to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, which ends in just three days. We have a goal of reaching $2,000 by the end of April to get our message out and keep our momentum rolling. It's time to pick up the pace. Will you click here and chip in $15 to help us reach our goal? I understand the global pandemic has caused tremendous damage to our economy, so I will be grateful for any gift you see fit to contribute today. Thank you so much. Your support today will make the difference in November. Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

# Ballots Go Out on May 8th
Due to the Covid-19 crisis, Montana has gone to all mail ballots for the primary election in June. On top of dozens of events being cancelled due to this pandemic, this means that we have even less time to spread our message of more transparency and conservative values to voters around the state.

We need to make sure we reach as many voters as possible because Montana cannot afford to lose this election to a Democrat.

**Will you chip in today to help push us across the finish line? **

Thank you,
Troy

body:
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first contribution to Warren Democrats before Thursday's midnight fundraising deadline. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e4/45c30650/1caf67b7b/66e9036c/249996567/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first contribution to Warren Democrats before Thursday's midnight fundraising deadline. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now:

We've set an ambitious April fundraising goal to kick off our robust organizing plan that will hold the Trump administration accountable and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

And whether or not we reach this goal depends only on the number of grassroots supporters who chip in before Thursday's deadline. Because we're 100% grassroots-funded and I wouldn't have it any other way.

It's a big goal. But our grassroots team has powered this movement further than anyone could have imagined. And with supporters like you by my side, I know we can reach it together.

**[I'm only asking because your continued support right now would be powerfully important: If you're in a place to donate today, will you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help grow our movement and hit our goal before Thursday's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e4/45c30650/1caf67b7b/66e90350/249996567/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyOEZfRU9NX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwNDI4X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ28F_EOM_EWD_E_20200428_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

body:
|
#
_These are difficult times, so please only donate if you can afford to do so. Just knowing you opened this email in the first place makes us grateful. Thank you._
* * *
Take a look at some important facts about our opponent, folks — **FACT:** Republican Jason Lewis was handpicked by Donald Trump to run against Tina Smith. He’s even called Minnesota’s “Mini-Trump” — which means there’s no doubt he’d be just another lapdog for the President. **FACT:** As a former congressman, Lewis spent his time in Washington siding with powerful special interests over the people of Minnesota — voting to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions and to give tax breaks to big corporations. **FACT:** To make matters worse, Lewis is a climate change denier, opposes any and all gun safety reform, and he has a history of deeply offensive views about women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community — the list goes on. **FACT:** In the middle of a crisis, Lewis has downplayed the seriousness of the virus — comparing it to the flu and calling it a "wintertime sickness" — and has ignored health officials' social distancing guidelines designed to protect our health care professionals, our first responders, our seniors, and countless others. **FACT: Jason Lewis’ irresponsible leadership has no place in the U.S. Senate, but we need your help to defeat him and re-elect a responsible leader like Tina Smith in November. FACT: Jason Lewis’ irresponsible leadership has no place in the U.S. Senate, but we need your help to defeat him and re-elect a responsible leader like Tina Smith in November. Donate $10 (or more!) before our end-of-month deadline, and together, we can save Minnesota’s Senate seat. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = FACT:** Minnesotans deserve better than someone who will throw them under the bus the first chance they get. That's why we're doing whatever it takes to make sure Tina is re-elected. She's exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. Thanks for reading. — Save Minnesota’s Senate Seat Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: in a race this close (incredible opportunity)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Losing in Georgia means Mitch McConnell wins.
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm running against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) for U.S. Senate, and I need your help: While my opponent is a former Wall Street exec who's cashing in on her public office and being accused of insider trading, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service. I'm running for Senate to stand up to corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell and restore moral leadership to our government.
_The Washington Post _says winning this race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate. Right now, we're running neck-and-neck with our opponent - but while she's spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that depends on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, at this critical moment, we 're falling incredibly short of our April end-of-month goal. **
That's why this news is so amazing: **A group of fired-up donors has stepped up to match every single donation, dollar for dollar, to help us get back on track - but only for the next 48 hours. [Please, will you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to our government? When you give right now, your contribution will go _twice_ as far.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e705/288179be/a6dac6a/348e8c78/1929843535/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk171-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
The fact that McConnell is lining up the full force of the GOP establishment to keep this seat red proves one thing, and one thing only: He's _terrified_ that his Senate majority is in _serious_ danger.
But here's the deal: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign, my opponent has outraised us by writing herself a staggering $10 million check - and you can bet there's plenty more where that came from.
In a race this close, falling short of our end-of-month goal isn't an option - and failing to take advantage of this rare match opportunity could mean handing Senate control to Mitch McConnell for another two years.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate - but we _have_ ****to win in Georgia.** So if you care about flipping Georgia blue, ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority and restoring moral leadership to our government, I'm counting on you******to rush your immediate grassroots support before our critical match expires: **
**[Please, friend: Give $5 or more ($5 becomes $10)- before our crucial midnight deadline - to have every dollar DOUBLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e705/288179be/a6dac6a/348e8c78/1929843535/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk171-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for coming through when it matters most. I appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e705/288179be/a6dac6a/348e8c78/1929843535/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk171-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| | | Friends,

The past 6 weeks have been an unprecedented time for all of us. Americans are struggling, businesses have been forced to shut down, and millions of people have filed for unemployment. **But one thing is certain, Kansans will persevere, as we always have. **

You won't find this as a surprise, but the Democrats refuse to let any sort of crisis go to waste. Instead of helping President Trump and the American people, they have been playing politics. This is why it's more important than ever that we _Take Back the House from Nancy Pelos_i in 2020.

Our online fundraising efforts from people like you are more important than ever. Every contribution helps us get out our message. [Would you consider contributing $50, $25, or even $10 to help us reach our goal this month?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3d40ba8737&e=1050d051da)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Friends, The past 6 weeks have been an unprecedented time for all of us. Americans are struggling, businesses have been forced to shut down, and millions of people have filed for unemployment. But one thing is certain, Kansans will persevere, as we always have. You won't find this as a surprise, but the Democrats refuse to let any sort of crisis go to waste. Instead of helping President Trump and the American people, they have been playing politics. This is why it's more important than ever that we Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi in 2020. Our online fundraising efforts from people like you are more important than ever. Every contribution helps us get out our message. | "Add Your Name to the List of Jake's Supporters" | We are stronger as a nation when we have conservative leadership in all levels of government, which is why Jake supports Donald J. Trump for President. Jake is a strong member of the team of Republican fighters helping re-elect President Trump, and he will continue to fight alongside him in Washington D.C. as a member of Congress. | We're in this together. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: My good friend Cory Booker needs your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
All of us have a part to play. |
#
It's been a challenging few months for us all, friend, as we've grappled with our new reality in the face of a global pandemic. Yet through it all, I've been most heartened by our leaders and elected officials who have fought tooth and nail to pass legislation that addresses the needs of hardest-hit folks and their families. My good friend Cory Booker has been one of those leaders -- his work in the Senate the last few weeks alone has ensured that millions of Americans received financial relief through the CARES Act, expanded COVID-19 testing resources and increased funding for local health care and hospital services. We need to do everything we can to keep Cory in the Senate fighting for our values come this November -- and that's why I'm reaching out to you today. **Cory is up against an all-important end-of-month deadline and has set a $50,000 goal for April. But donations have slowed down in the last few days and he 's in danger of missing that goal. Will you chip in a few dollars today so that he will have the resources he needs to run a winning campaign between now and November?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200428-abrams?refcode=cab-em-200428-abrams&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [Chip in $100 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200428-abrams?refcode=cab-em-200428-abrams&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

---
Cory has been a tireless advocate for the people throughout his entire life and has made every day in the Senate count by fighting for access to quality health care, national paid family leave, reproductive freedom, gun violence prevention and more.
He leads with his heart and sets the standard for elected leaders across the country. Hitting this goal is a critical part of keeping him in the Senate come November, so thank you for joining me in supporting his campaign today with a donation of any amount.
-- Stacey Abrams

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

name: Tom Steyer
subject: I’m matching donations to the BET + United Way COVID-19 Relief Fund. If you can, please donate today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Dear friend, I’ve talked to friends and community leaders about the disproportionate impact COVID-19 has had on the African American community. Higher death rates and small businesses collapsing amplify the racial disparity that already existed. My conscience won’t allow me to stand by while my neighbors suffer.

That is why I’m partnering with BET and United Way Worldwide to support their COVID-19 Relief Fund, which will provide critical support for the African American community. We know that when we join forces, our impact can be even greater. **So starting today, I will match every donation this community makes to the relief fund, for the first $100,000 — I hope you’ll join me by making a donation today.**
---
| [Donate today](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZq-2BljAuiIpYeat0iDKY7eH2goH-2F-2BGtdMcMfyEmRNX1rU3r58g8u1jg2-2Ffk71ixLZBqi1seoII0OsH6kbbFFAcmM-3DxsHL_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwMzAWjJCphoq0UWPsvUAObgk2IAeKvljCyTbzRaC1Y6SSIen5H8gEa5uQ-2BzYZ45qUYq5BczPt-2Bf9lTNLtC-2FjyyNqR7H2g6-2FD3OKh8buDl1JIkIWlAh9My3zd4bWFjtcwRJIbJnOwhRdPeVm9E-2Fvydx4LnrCQ7w5PzqKrW2ae-2BbW-2FQIo-2Fl3CKBMtTbrdups6PMomYmHL0dLAGk81Pg4jK1aU-2B-2BdIMVI6a-2FZaXHdpQYqeBlDoeZu0twN-2FPtcD22VLB5r4KA5WIDl-2Fo-2BdUjdc9sHyvlpX1HnwV0wKjf0K6Y-2B-2BmQ0wsrVE8WoCI8Ryr-2F8gtE0vFUWkYdy-2FsISL7mu3wJytOZDMdPRkVHaQhF9jLJI-2FGPXa-2BINnwGamuIOGybFvzIcnTYEGklrqWsSovzO-2FF5pVUDoKZBHlD-2FF5tPCFyKeMWUGI3ZEAN-2BeH-2FVm24hoyDI0aMHKKt6ox-2FLhBTAOuWYu-2B52kAaX2rXOXSnnv61XJQ1byJTA9cvVMgNbfOfs-2FaorPkWeeFo0d6sRTGSoYMu3qnxqSS6I8I-2B0aHeEgSD1jhBKiL8KfXUmm2w-2BZUXxZdNdfSzjFCcDXHIj-2FYMcpKfIxkDLKB-2FXvRjmBS0qL4nZqMPdvxi-2Bga7UAZN3gVgx0X33dbAA5lVzn3Q9tVk8fQVHUeHhB8OJF63P-2BNM2x1CnueznDVtr7m-2F-2FehxU3ozQb9A6sTEj5TJUlwiQEKqi8QRHoxQ-3D-3D)
---
BET has a strong legacy of advocating for African Americans, and United Way is deeply embedded in 95% of communities across the country. Their combined effort will work towards directly addressing the urgent needs caused by the pandemic — and those efforts will be led by community leaders working directly to service those needs.

Recent reports show that increased pollution density heightens the risk of coronavirus, so it is no wonder that the communities that have been corporate dumping grounds for years are suffering the worst of the pandemic. This, coupled with the fact that [_African Americans are often subjected to discrimination when it comes to health care_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZmTA4Yogg7cZMU-2F9bC7f8E7u1bEHvI3GMOpkTS8lk57CqQvH4Jaq7Xc-2FXmP7SeoWVhhtdtFjH3tFJAr57dbWZ4R7Bsl0t-2FYBdoTGKUP9U17LqJlDrH5oaXduO-2FZqSrnh3T3DsrNy8HdTeWFmLbflPheVMydMg1wD-2BSHZS73oK31EGHdq_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwMzAWjJCphoq0UWPsvUAObgk2IAeKvljCyTbzRaC1Y6SSIen5H8gEa5uQ-2BzYZ45qUYq5BczPt-2Bf9lTNLtC-2FjyyNqR7H2g6-2FD3OKh8buDl1JIkIWlAh9My3zd4bWFjtcwRJIbJnOwhRdPeVm9E-2Fvydx4LnrCQ7w5PzqKrW2ae-2BbW-2FQIo-2Fl3CKBMtTbrdups6PMomYmHL0dLAGk81Pg4jK1aU-2B-2BdIMVI6a-2FZaXHdpQYqeBlDoeZu0twN-2FPtcD22VLB5r4KA5WIDl-2Fo-2BdUjdc9sHyvlpX1HnwV0wKjf0K6Y-2B-2BmQ0wsrVE8WoCI8Ryr-2F8gtE0vFUWkYdy-2FsISL7mu3wJytOZDMdPRkVHaQhF9jLJI-2FGPXa-2BINnwGamuIOGybFvzIcnTYEGklrqWsSovzO-2FF5pVUDoKZBHlD-2FF5tPCFyKeMWUGI3ZEAN-2BeH-2FVm24hoyDI0aMHKKt6ox-2FLhBTAOuWYu-2B52kAaX2rXOXSnnv61XJQ1Yjtj8F4BrR5cor7gQf5R-2FTkpCmwJ3TziGMBB8XswF2AJ-2FpULPMLIJ78eJTqYp5NlYqMhZWYQRyNM71NE-2FB-2BgHfZKCa-2B2LB3q9vA-2BK18hP63sR3N-2FrhWdQN49b-2F1Q6QWOvvE1FnEX2wcAmZCdA1Ed98iXLRx6ERwFiynS70k6c-2BUKcQOE-2FuOfXQx0JuSwejsXlw2FQfDGrSl1KpzxOzE4aJObgQ6f-2FFggdBpGppTfeVbw-3D-3D), results in the stark numbers we are seeing.

>From the abolitionist movement to the anti-lynching and civil rights movement, African Americans and other people of good conscience have centered us on the right side of history. I’ve often viewed African Americans as a key moral center of our country — it's time again for us to stand in support of our neighbors.

clean_body: | | | | Dear friend, I’ve talked to friends and community leaders about the disproportionate impact COVID-19 has had on the African American community. Higher death rates and small businesses collapsing amplify the racial disparity that already existed. My conscience won’t allow me to stand by while my neighbors suffer. That is why I’m partnering with BET and United Way Worldwide to support their COVID-19 Relief Fund, which will provide critical support for the African American community. We know that when we join forces, our impact can be even greater. So starting today, I will match every donation this community makes to the relief fund, for the first $100,000 — I hope you’ll join me by making a donation today. | BET has a strong legacy of advocating for African Americans, and United Way is deeply embedded in 95% of communities across the country. Their combined effort will work towards directly addressing the urgent needs caused by the pandemic — and those efforts will be led by community leaders working directly to service those needs. Recent reports show that increased pollution density heightens the risk of coronavirus, so it is no wonder that the communities that have been corporate dumping grounds for years are suffering the worst of the pandemic. This, coupled with the fact that , results in the stark numbers we are seeing. From the abolitionist movement to the anti-lynching and civil rights movement, African Americans and other people of good conscience have centered us on the right side of history. I’ve often viewed African Americans as a key moral center of our country — it's time again for us to stand in support of our neighbors. We can only fight back successfully when we come together and work toward a common goal. We must stand united, even while we are physically apart. Thank you, Tom | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Please visit for information and resources to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and prevent infection. Follow CDC guidelines, including social distancing to avoid large groups and unnecessary contact with others, and adhere to instruction from your local and state elected officials. We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: don't drink bleach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| Last week President Trump fired Rick Bright, who was leading the federal agency tasked with developing a vaccine for coronavirus.

Dr. Bright was fired because he refused to recommend hydroxychloroquine to treat COVID-19 despite the lack of studies proving its efficacy and early indications of increased mortality. Dr. Bright has announced he will be filing a whistleblower complaint against the Trump Administration.

The Senate needs to investigate Dr. Bright's firing and the Administration's actions to encourage the use of unproven drugs. I am also calling on the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services to launch an inquiry into what happened.

[_**Add your name here to demand that Trump stop endangering us by attacking medical professionals for sticking to the scientific evidence and doing their jobs to protect the American people!**_](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de919fc/70cdc2ba/45a63b8d/390e768/3997114772/VEsH/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/doctors?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+Trump+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_WL_200428_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EN_WL_200428_1_1")

This dangerous pattern of trying to silence top health experts in favor of promoting politically motivated messages and 'quack' ideas is getting worse daily.

Last week, on national TV Trump suggested that scientists explore inserting DISINFECTANT into the bodies of individuals with coronavirus to clear them from the disease -- and implied that Americans might try this strategy themselves!

[**_Trump needs to know the American people are watching this show of incompetence -- and we are angry. Sign here if you agree._**](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de919fc/70cdc2ba/45a63b8d/390e769/3997114772/VEsE/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/doctors?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Trump+needs+to+know+the+American+people+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_WL_200428_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EN_WL_200428_1_1")

The Trump Administration's malpractice has already led to unnecessary deaths and extended the length and pain of the pandemic in our country.

We can't afford to brush this off as "standard Trump operating procedures."

We're in this together,

Chris

---
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
---

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

[Click here](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de919fc/70cdc2ba/45a63b8d/390e766/3997114772/VEsF/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-footer-2020?amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_WL_200428_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EN_WL_200428_1_1") to donate.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Major Update on Coronavirus Testing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
the actions you’re taking are making us safer.

<>

Friends,

“Testing is a key part of the whole equation and we’re getting it dialed in
correctly.” –Governor Holcomb

Since the first day of the COVID-19 pandemic, Governor Holcomb and his team
have prioritized coronavirus testing.Indiana is now near the top in the Midwest
in testing per capita!

<>

Today, the governor shared even more good news and announced a new partnership
with OptumServe Health Services thatwill expand testing capacity by 30,000
tests per week throughout Indiana.

This is 30,000 more tests per week on top of what the Indiana State Department
of Health is already doing.

The partnership with OptumServe will allow for all symptomatic Hoosiers—or
anyone who has encountered a symptomatic person—to get tested.

“If you are showing symptoms, you can be tested. And it’s free.” –Governor
Holcomb

Yes, testing is free.

You do not need insurance to get tested. Although, if you do have insurance,
please bring your insurance information to the testing site.

OptumServe will set up 20 testing sites in the next 7 days and expand to 50
sites throughout Indiana over the next two weeks.

<>

Once OptumServe is completely up and running, the expanded capacity will allow
for over 100,000 COVID-19 tests a month.

“We can do all the testing, and make all the investments, but we can’t stop
there. Your physical distancing and the actions you’re taking are making a huge
difference. Now’s the time to stay vigilant.” –Governor Holcomb

Even with this great news on expanded testing, now’s not the time to let our
foot off the gas. We’re one day closer to a wider opening of our state and the
actions you’re taking are making us safer.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=d6778793bf5c436dbc56333f5e154799&_t=z4MOawnWDpJjgXZchNGNOKRFazetmOczZPusc9nRNsiSi4x9bXCH6tBPAvA51xgW8bdL9xAxjGHw-3MxqbjD1Vix7s7lzjj8XASAfQXZU_KHu5NRjEqH4TaeVwt6225a-E9RqafhOId2rvIkF8RFlPgM7h7p4nFdpSj7rrNa674%3D>

body:

| | Peter,

We're now officially just TWO WEEKS away from our special election day.

And since Christy isn't taking a cent from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists, it's up to folks like you to fuel this campaign.

**[Our records show you haven't pitched in yet, but there's still time. Thank you,

Team Christy

\-----------------------------Forwarded Message-----------------------------

Send date: April 25, 2020 at 2:11 p.m.
From: Records Dept (via Christy Smith for Congress)
Subject line: Are you one of the thousands of grassroots supporters on our team?

Hey,

We are less than 3 weeks away from our election day -- and it's so important every member of this team does their part.

Already _thousands_ of people have chipped in to save this seat from a Republican takeover. We wanted to make sure everyone who is able to help out during these critical final days can, so we're going through our records before the end of the month.

Here's what we have for this email address:

| **ONLINE DONOR RECORD**

Name: Peter
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Special Election Donor Status: NOT YET

**[Suggested Action: Make your first donation today](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb4c/29776869/a56abbd/569f622b/419093612/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tMWtpY2stczEifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom1kick-s1")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb4c/29776869/a56abbd/569f622b/419093612/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tMWtpY2stczEifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom1kick-s1")
---

It's so important that we raise $100,000 before April is over -- that's the amount we need to fight back against the heaps of Republican special interest money pouring into this race.

Mike Garcia promises to be a rubber stamp to the dangerous Trump agenda -- we cannot let that happen.

**[We're counting on you to step up to help meet our last end-of-month goal before the election -- there's not much time left. Rush a donation today>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb4c/29776869/a56abbd/569f622b/419093612/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjhfZW9tMWtpY2stczEifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200428_eom1kick-s1")**

Thanks for being a part of the team!

body:

Hillary Clinton endorsed Joe Biden for President of the United States...

We expect Democrats to be energized by this endorsement, but we need conservatives now more than ever to unite and show the Left that we're ready for the fight and we stand with President Trump.

**Can we count on you to join the countermovement against "Joe-mentum"?**
****

They look to a spiteful Democratic nominee who lost to President Trump for their cues, refusing to accept the outcome of 2016.

And they support a candidate whose proposed solutions for America are to bring the country back to 2012 and the "glory days" of the Obama presidency.

**It 's sad, it's desperate, and it's clear: the Left will do ANYTHING and vote for ANYONE to remove President Trump from office.**

The last thing we need is Hillary telling us who to vote for. It's on proud conservatives like you to step up and defend the progress we've made under Republican leadership.

Stand with President Trump to continue fighting for job creation, tax cuts, constitutionalist judges, secure borders, and support for small businesses by making a donation right now!
