name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Why I'm running for Senate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b4f/171533825/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I got into this race because we need stronger leadership in the Senate. And if I thought that six months ago, I think it even more now. Here's why: This virus has exposed what happens when communities in our Commonwealth are underserved and under-protected. Places like Chelsea and Brockton, disproportionately getting sick, going hungry, losing the people they love. Places like Springfield, forced to fight for its fair share of resources and protection. With everything we are up against - from COVID-19 to the daily wreckage of Donald J. Trump - our people cannot afford absent leadership. Senator Markey isn't here enough. He isn't in Massachusetts enough. And in the months ahead, more than ever, we are going to need a Senator who will be on the ground - with us - as we recover and rebuild. We are also going to need a Senator with the judgment this moment demands. Senator Markey does not have a record of good judgment in times of crisis. In the wake of 9/11, he voted to give us the Iraq War and the Patriot Act. In the midst of a substance use and public health epidemic in the '90s, he voted for a Crime Bill that locked people up instead of getting them well. At a time when our climate crisis was reaching an apex, when Democrats controlled all three chambers of government, he couldn't get a bill done on cap and trade. He voted present when President Obama asked Congress for war powers in Syria. He voted present again when Mitch McConnell brought the Green New Deal to the Senate floor. Now, we face a crisis of unimaginable magnitude. And if you want to know what kind of leadership I will bring to this seat -- in contrast to Senator Markey -- just look at what we have done with our campaigns over the last month. I immediately suspended political activities and shifted to a digital operation focused on one thing: COVID-19. I paused fundraising for myself to raise nearly $100k for frontline organizations driving our response. I reoriented my entire volunteer and organizer network to make wellness calls and check in with seniors across the state. I have dedicated every inch of my time, my resources, and my staff to COVID-19. Senator Markey didn't. That's the difference between us. As your U.S. Senator, I will do better than the political status quo. I will do more than cast good votes or write good bills in Washington. I will show up on the frontlines in Massachusetts. I will fight in the trenches. I will listen, and I will lead. Because that's what Massachusetts needs to get through this. | Together, we will get through this. We will fight for our health, our safety, and our future. We will enact the bold policies we need to rebuild and recover. If you are financially able, please consider making a contribution to our campaign. With your help, we can win our primary on September 1st, and give Massachusetts stronger leadership in the U.S. Senate. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b49/171533825/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-04-28-whyimin&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b4b/171533825/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-04-28-whyimin&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$33](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b55/171533825/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIzMyJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=33&refcode=2020-04-28-whyimin&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b57/171533825/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-04-28-whyimin&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b51/171533825/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b52/171533825/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b53/171533825/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b5c/171533825/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b5d/171533825/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b5f/171533825/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901a3/55b66746/2077b977/80e5b58/171533825/VEsHBg/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: If Trump won't lead, others must
body:
Read Mike's latest message on the COVID-19 response.

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=05f10ee02f264c6abf86663e9714ec3c&_e=gVyBpSvHnVIerdKHg9Nhimh7zDKY25y-t7m6n5Jnc9kYDPb3g24YzZ0dx_cODlwTPgMAI1R6i0IqV1ACv_t7ovHK-QxZRWLtFHKwZ_6y2CIxu08TAxoqJzJ2DG-tJfaNYVFoy1KVeYZsQUhzKrLz4ukXIgyPTYfPot2ppJcVPXvCMqUgTSzPYgaA_cbQxT9d9Icz-QmtFyzxdcrAXMXf8nd_vB6B7X3qT8YfNrQ7ZnuMtVwdPMPD2AZQFaXO5AyB1hp_spaEI5bD9jKk-xBBe1H9FjREtS8HrkqAiwPVDSHDymx8HPDcr41QKRp8gSgI) Friend, As of today, the U.S. has more than 1 million confirmed cases of COVID-19. And we know, unfortunately, that for every confirmed case there are many more that are uncounted. This tragic milestone is a stark reminder of how critical it is that we continue to follow the guidance of experts and keep fighting to stop the spread of COVID-19. That approach is working. Infection and hospitalization rates are leveling off where people are letting expertise and science -- not politics -- guide their approach. However, the coordinated, global response this crisis calls for is not taking shape, largely because America has not stepped up to lead. **[Read the latest piece from Mike, "If Trump Won't Lead the World, Others Must," about the leadership gap in the global COVID-19 response, and where we need to go from here.](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=05f10ee02f264c6abf86663e9714ec3c&_e=gVyBpSvHnVIerdKHg9NhirtXEPGRB6o5zPxEA2qY722i5ERDteV_euSrltzqdoldadtkiy1ypAkBrsb7idYoirbTFHNygH9-vwM00gdfHmf6gL8pgPdRSiQRvoj4haKcuDL795h7Zz9qMr4rNeapuhcKMw4h9-aHy0kVQp7ymTwFTvYHs1__S20iEV8O4223iO3a3em9QLozpH2Pb-PbrCGY8VAj2LOUaTebcu5qUKOMwSGtsPYwI6ZdcAR9XehT04W6NKEYpnU_a0V3tvFkPb0Ljm39vRn11KNCWTMZoXTVxtua6fYbL-iH1PstteRrK6iTez64abs__FpT8XHAcYw_Dd6LCwbp8s0ENlNP_wvuktLRPn3nY8IB-WGnBi46QKxYbfJI0v0dCALaPUZTvG5Vrk8TAXa-fsNkvjDtbzz6oQ9k2Ni5JJp3UgOfzpDD0TQ9WFPmR8VXJRXIHBWPmA%3D%3D)** This is a global pandemic -- but right now, the leaders taking real action and finding solutions in the U.S. are mayors, governors, and local officials. Bloomberg Philanthropies has launched programs to bring mayors and public health experts together, tracking and sharing their actions and supporting the best possible responses. But more needs to be done. **Read Mike's article to find out how he believes others can and should fill the leadership gap:** [**https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/articles/2020-04-28/coronavirus-pandemic-if-trump-won-t-lead-the-world-others-must**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=05f10ee02f264c6abf86663e9714ec3c&_e=gVyBpSvHnVIerdKHg9NhirtXEPGRB6o5zPxEA2qY722i5ERDteV_euSrltzqdoldadtkiy1ypAkBrsb7idYoirbTFHNygH9-vwM00gdfHmf6gL8pgPdRSiQRvoj4haKcuDL795h7Zz9qMr4rNeapuhcKMw4h9-aHy0kVQp7ymTwFTvYHs1__S20iEV8O4223iO3a3em9QLozpH2Pb-PbrCGY8VAj2LOUaTebcu5qUKOMwSGtsPYwI6ZdcAR9XehTb9SIJQ4wQpBNtKQv-FAVcHVum5HGm6IsTp5IYqT0-612s6aw7_FT9DuobobVwlipf_elR9lM8L0_upRrAJGbrWV0hcZpt1cAN0t1kbIiASk5-veZ_EcE2rh_VOgDd3a6yXjo9XRcf8yV0W3yiyT3HBubgiVCCaJ9zGLxulDjlylISKLpxI4Jy7gIF3gzDzyniiYVjEwfZNR9c6TFslOrVQ%3D%3D) Thanks, Bloomberg Philanthropies

clean_body: Read Mike's latest message on the COVID-19 response. | You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you! Friend, As of today, the U.S. has more than 1 million confirmed cases of COVID-19. And we know, unfortunately, that for every confirmed case there are many more that are uncounted. This tragic milestone is a stark reminder of how critical it is that we continue to follow the guidance of experts and keep fighting to stop the spread of COVID-19. That approach is working. Infection and hospitalization rates are leveling off where people are letting expertise and science -- not politics -- guide their approach. However, the coordinated, global response this crisis calls for is not taking shape, largely because America has not stepped up to lead. This is a global pandemic -- but right now, the leaders taking real action and finding solutions in the U.S. are mayors, governors, and local officials. Bloomberg Philanthropies has launched programs to bring mayors and public health experts together, tracking and sharing their actions and supporting the best possible responses. But more needs to be done. Read Mike's article to find out how he believes others can and should fill the leadership gap: Thanks, Bloomberg Philanthropies | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- .
